chapters.text: David lengpa chu atehse tan, akum jong a tam lheh jeng tai; mihon ama chu pon tampi asilpeh vangun David chun lum asa thei tapon ahi.

Hijeh chun David lhacha a pang hon jong ajah a aseiyun, “Kapu u lengpa din nu-ngah thah khat gahol uving ting, ama chun lengpa hi nakisah lelpi hen lang chule najenlen pangjo hen; chujong le kapu u lengpa dap nathoh jouna dingin hiche nu-ngah kahol diu chu nangma angsunga lum ji ji hen,” tin aseitauve.
Hijeh chun alhacha a pang ho chun Israel gamsung pumpia nu-ngah hoitah khat agahol’uvin ahileh Shu’nam mi Abishag kitinu chu agamudoh tauve, hiche nu chu lengpa henga ahinpui lutpeh tauvin ahi.
Nu-ngahnu chu amel-hoi lheh jengin, lengpa jenlen apangin, akinbol’in apangtai; ahivangin lengpa’n amanu chu akitimatpi thei tapoi.

Haggith chapa Adonijah chu amale ama akichoi sangin hitin aseiye, “Keima leng kachan ding ahi,” a tin; hiti chun acham chamin kangtalai tampi akisemin, sakol touthem mi jong tampi apansah tan, ama masang lamhong din jong mihem som nga jen apansah tai.

Ahivangin apan ahinkho sung chun, “Ipi dinga nangin hitobang banga hi thil nabola nahiti chon jeng ham?” tin adongin alung himosah khah hih hel’e. Adonijah kitipa hi pasal hoitah jong ahiye; ama jong hi Absalom chutoh kisanga peng ahi.
Adonijah hin Zeru’iah chapa Jo’ab le Abi’athar thempupa vang chu anadoh masah ahinai; amani jong hin Adonijah nung ajui lhona akithopi lhon ahitai;
Zadok thempupa leh Jehoi’ada chapa Benaiah ahin, Nathan themgao ahin, Shim’e-i ahin, Re’i ahin, chule David mihatse se vang chu Adonijah chutoh apang khom pouve.

Adonijah hin En-ro’gel koma songtum kisung koma chun kelngoi ho jong bongchal ho jong chule bongnou thaotah tah hon jong kilhaina gantha aboltai, chule Adonijah hin lengpa chapate asopi chengse jong akouvin, Judah gamsunga lengpa dinga panmun nei jouse jong akousoh keiyin ahi.
Ahinla Nathan themgaopa le Bena’iah, chule asopipa Solomon le mihat te chu khat cha jong akou tapoi.
Nathan hin Solomon nu Bathshe’ba jah a chun aseiyin, “Haggith chapa Adonijah leng achan jenga, ipu u David in ahetphah louhel thu hi nangman najah khah loulai ham?
Hijeh chun tun hung loiyin nangma nakihinso theina dingle nachapa Solomon nahinso theina dingin keiman lungthim nahilguh loiyinge.

David lengpa henga galut jel jengin lang ajah a gasei loiyin, ‘Kapu lengpa, nangma hi nasohnu kei koma nakitep’a nakihahsel chun hitin naseiyin, “Nachapa Solomon hi keima ban a leng chang ding ahin, keima laltouna hung tou ding ahi,” tia nasei hilou ham? Chuti ahileh itidola Adonijah khu leng chang jeng hi tam?’ gatin.
Hitobanga hi nangman lengpa koma thu naseipet tah hin kei jong hung vah lut pai paiying ting nathusei ho chu adih nai, tia kahung suhdet ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Bathshe’ba jong chu lengpa umna aindan sunga chun alut tai; hiche laiya hi lengpa tehse behseh jeng ahitan, Shunam mi Abishag kitinu hin lengpa kin abolpeh peh ahibep tai.
Bathshe’ba chu agakunin lengpa chu salam agabola ahileh, lengpa’n jong ahindongin, “Ipi nadeiyam?” ati.

Chuphat’in amanunjong ajah a aseipaiyin, “Kapu, nasohnu keima henga hin nangma Pakai na-Pathen min panin nakihahsel’in hitin naseiye, ‘Nachapa Solomon hin keima ban a lengvai ahinpoh ding, ama hi keima laltouna chunga hung tou ding ahi,’ nati.
Ahinla tun vetan, kapu lengpa’n nahet louhel vangin, Adonijah chu leng achang tai.

Adonijah khun lengchan kilhaina gantha abol’in, bongchal ho athat’in, bongnou thaotah tah athat’in, kelngoite jong neng jeng jungin a that jengin, lengpa chapate abonchauvin akouvin, Abi’athar thempupa le sepai lamkaipa Jo’ab jong akouve; ahin nasohpa Solomon hilah akoupoi.
Hijeng jongle lengpa kapu, Israel pumpi hin kapu lengpa nangma hin naban a leng hung changa nalaltouna hung tou ding chu koi hiding ahi, tia naseidoh peh ding ham, tia navet lhih cheh-u ahitai.
Chutia bolchetna nanei louva ahileh, khonung teng kapu lengpa nangla thin natin napu napate chutoh kijam khom tan natin, keile kachapa Solomon hi min doumah bola eihin ngaito lo lhonding ahi,” ati.
Hitia hi Bathshe’ba’in lengpa koma thu anaseipet tah hin Nathan themgaopa jong chu ahung vah lut tan ahi.
Hijeh chun mihonjong lengpa chu aseipeh-uvin, “Nathan themgaopa jong ahung lut’e,” atiuva ahileh; Nathan jong lengpa angsunga alut paiyin akunin tola amai asulut tai.
Hichun Nathanin aseitai, “Kapu lengpa, nangman ‘Adonijah hi keima ban a hung lengvaipoa, kalaltouna hung tou ding ahi,’ tia nasei khah mong ham?

Ijeh-inem itileh tunin Adonijah chu achesuh-in kilhaina gantha abol’in, bongchal tampi athat’in, bongnou thaotah tah athat’in, chule kelngoi jong neng jengjungin athat’in, lengpa chapate a bonchauvin akouvin, sepaite lamkaipa Jo’ab le Abi’athar them pupa jong akouve; chule vetan, amaho khun an aneuvin lengpitwi adon’uvin, Adonijah angsunga, ‘Adonijah lengpa hingsot hen,’ tin asam sam jenguve.
Ahinla nasohpa nalhacha keima le Zadok thempupa ahin, Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah ahin, chule nalhacha Solomon mi hicheng vang hi eikou pouve.

Hiche thil kibol hi kapu lengpa’n jong naphatsah hitam? Chujongle kapu lengpa’n nangma nunga nalaltouna a hung tou ding chu koi ahi ding, hiche nalhachate henga hi nasei lou lai khat jong ham?” tin adong tan ahi.
Hichun David lengpa’n adonbut’in, “Bathshe’ba chu hinkou lut’uvin,” ati. Hijeh chun Bathshe’ba jong lengpa angsunga ahung lut’in amasanga chun ading tai.
Hichun lengpa akihahsel’in aseitan ahi, “Kakidoupi jousea kona eihuhhing jing jeng Pakai chu aitih a hing jing ahin,

keima nahenga Pakai Israel Pathen mina kihahselsa a hitia kaseisa ahitai, “Keima ban a nachapa Solomon hin lengvai ahinpoh ding ahin, keima khel’a ama hi keima laltouna chunga hung tou ding ahi,’ katisa ahi; hitobang banga chu tunia jong kabol ding ahi,” atitai.
Chuphat’in Bathshe’ba jong chu akunin tola amai asulut’in lengpa chu salam aboltai, chujongle amanu’n aseiyin, “Kapu David lengpa hingsot hen!” ati.
David lengpa’n aseitai, “Zadok thempupa le Nathan themgaopa, chule Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah chu kahenga gakou lut loiyun,” atileh; amaho chengse jong chu lengpa angsunga ahung lutsoh keitauvin ahi.
Hichun ajah-uva lengpa’n aseiyin, “Napu u lengpa lhacha asohte chengse kipuiyun lang, chule kachapa Solomon chu keima sakolpol chunga chun tousah-uvin lang, Gihon kitilaiya chun puisuh tem’uvin;

chutengle hikoma chun Zadok thempupa le Nathan themgaopan Solomon hi Israelte chunga leng chang din thao nujeng lhonhen; chutah le saki pengkul mut ginguvin, ‘Solomon lengpa hingsot hen, ‘tin sam jenguvin.

Chujou tengleh nang ho chengse Solomon nunga nahung kijot touvuva, Solomon jong hunga keima laltouna a tou ding ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh ama hi keima khel’a leng chang ding ahitai; ajeh chu ama hi keiman Israel chung le Judah chunga leng chang dinga kalhendohsa ahitan ahi,” ati.
Hichea hin Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah chun lengpa adonbut’in, “Amen, Pakai, kapu lengpa Pathen chun hiti chunba sei hen.
Pakaiyin kapu lengpa hi napanpi jing jeng ahin, hitobang chun Solomon jong panpi jing hen lang, chule alaltouna jeng jong kapu David lengpa laltouna sangin minthang jon semdoh hen,” ati.

Zadok thempupa toh, Nathan themgaopa toh, Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah toh chule Chereth mite leh Peleth mite chengse chu akitolsuh jenguvin, Solomon chu David lengpa sakolpol chunga atousah-uvin Gihon kiti laiya chun ahinpui suh tauve.

Gihon muna hin Zadok thempupan ponbuh sunga thaotwi kikhumna saki chu alan, Solomon chu thao anutai. Chutah chun mihon saki pengkul chu amut’uvin, chujongle mipin abonchauvin asam’uvin, “Solomon lengpa hingsot hen!” atiuve.
Chuin mipi abonchan Solomon nunga ahung kitoltou kit’uvin, theile amut’un, hachangpan akipah-uvin ahileh ahusau chun leiset apoh khihel tobangin aum jenge.

Adonijah le alengchan golvahna akou mihon golvah abol chai chaiyuvin hiche Solomon lengchan husa thongje ju pi chu ajatauve. Saki pengkul kimut ging chu Jo’ab hin ajahdoh phat’in, “Khopi sunga hibanga thongje jua kija khu ipi kibol hi-nga na,” tin aseitai.

Jo’ab chun hitin thu asei nalaiyin vetan, Abi’athar thempupa chapa Jonathan chu ahungin ahileh, Adonijah chun ajah a “Hung lut’in, lut’in, nang hi mi phachom tah nahin, thupha nahinpoh tei ding ginchat aume,” ati.
Ahinla Jonathan chun Adonijah adonbut’in, “Apha ahipoi, ijeh-inem itileh ipu u David lengpa’n Solomon chu lengin atungtan ahi;
hijeh chun lengpa’n Solomon chu Zadok thempupa le Nathan themgaopa toh, Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah toh Chereth mite le Peleth mite toh asol’in, amahon Solomon chu lengpa sakolpol chunga atousah tauve;

chuin Zadok them pupa le Nathan themgaopan Solomon chu Gihon kiti laiya chun leng chang dingin thao anulhon tan ahi; Gihon a kona chu mipi hung kitol’uva kipah thanom tah a hung ahiuvin, hijeh a chu khopi sung khu thongje ju jeng-ah ahitai. Nang hon tua najah-u khu hiche husa chu ahi.
Solomon chu lengpa laltouna a atoutai.

Hiche keoseh chu ahipoi, lengpa lhachate mi tamtah ahung hung jenguvin, ipu u David lengpa salam ahung bol-uvin hitin ahung seiyui, ‘Nangma Pathen chun nang sangin jong Solomon hi minthansah hen lang, chule alaltouna jong nang laltouna sangin nasa jon semdoh hen,’ atiuve. Chutengle lengpa chu amatah jeng jong ajalkhun chunga akhasu sujie.
Chujongle lengpa’n aseiyin, ‘Tuni nikhoa keima laltouna touthei ding chapa khat eipea Pakai Israel Pathen chu nun nom hen hotobanga keima jeng jong kamit tah a eimusah theipa chun’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chutah chun Adonijah golvah a kikou kholai miho chu abonchan akihot lhul gamtauvin, akipatdoh cheh uvin ama ama inlam cheh akijot soh keitauve.
Adoni jah jong chun Solomon chu akichan, hijeh chun achen akipatdoh paiyin maicham phunga saki teni chu agatuh chah jengin ahi.

Ahin min Solomon jah a agaseipeh-in, hitin ati, “Vetan, Adonijah chun Solomon lengpa agingtai; ajeh chu ven, Adonijah chun maicham phunga saki teni atuh chah den jengin hitin aseiye, ‘Solomon lengpa’n asohpa kei hi chemjama eisat lih lou ding hinam, amasan kakoma kihahsel masa hen,’ tin aseiye,” agati.

Hichun Solomon in jong, “Ama mi phachom ahiya, midih ahileh asamjang khat jeng cha jong tola lhamang louhel ding ahin, amavang achunga themmona akimudoh a ahivang leh thi tei tei ding ahi,” a tin aseitai.

Hijeh chun Solomon lengpa’n mi asolin, amahon Adonijah chu maicham phunga konin ahinpui suh tauve. Adonijah chu ahungin Salomon lengpa salam ahung bole: hichun Solomon lengpanjong ajah a aseiyin. “Na-in lama chetan,” tin asoltai.
David chu athi phat ahung nailam phat’in achapa Solomon chu lhahna thu aseipeh-in hitin aseiye:
“Keima leiset’ a kona che mang ding koncha kahitai. Nangma hung thahat’in lang pasal umchan mong monga nahung um ding ahi,

chule Pakai na-Pathenin thu naseipeh chan chu nit jing jengin lang ama lamlhah jengjuiyin, achondan thu tapou nitpeh-in, athupeh chengse jong achonna dan jouse jong, aman hettohsahna aboljouse geiyin, Mose danthu lekhabua kisun bang bangin nit jing jengin; chutihen hileh natohna chan a khangtouvin natin, nakiheina lam lama naphattou thei ding ahi;

chujongle Pakaiyin keima thudola athusei jouse chu aphudet thei ding ahi, aman hitia asei chu, ‘Nachapaten akholhahna diu lampi akihetjinguva. alungthim pumpiu le ahinkho pumpiuva kitah tah le gunchu tah a keima angsunga boljing ding agel’ule nangman Israel sunga laltouna tou ding mihem lhahsamna nanei louhel ding ahi,’ tia anasei ahi.

“Hiche kalval jong hin Zeru’iah chapa Jo’ab kitipan keima eibolna nahet ding angaiye, aman Israel sepai lamkai teni Ner chapa Abner le Jether chapa Amasa atha jenga, gal laiya kithat miho thisan phu kalai, tia cham len laiya hitipia hi abola, kei dinga themmonabei thisan aso jeh a themmona katingpigua eipohsah a kachotna lam lama themmo eichansah ahi.
Hichejeh chun nachihna dungjui tah-in bol’in lang ateh nung hijongle hiche Jo’ab kitipa hi lung mong chan thisah hih hel’in.

Gilead mi Barzil’lai chapate vang kitah tah a nabola nangma ankong phunga an neho lah a ankong naumsah jing ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh amaho hin nasopipa Ab’salom ginna kajamdoh laiyin kitah tah-in einabol’uve.

Chujongle vetemin, Bahu’rim khoa mi Benjamin phunga hung kon Gera chapa Shim’e-i chu nakoma aume; ama hin Mahana’im jon a kache nin gaosapna melse tah tah-in eina gaosap’e, hijongle Jordan vadung panga keima lamtoa ahung kumsuh nin keiman Pakai min kapanin ama koma kakihahsel’in hitin kaseiye, ‘Keiman nang hi chemjamin nathat ponge,’ kati.

Hichejeh chun tun jong ama khu themmona beiyin gel dan ijeh-inem itileh nangma jong miching lung gel them khat nahi; hijeh chun ama jong hi talen matsah tei teiyin lang, asam kangsa tehse hijeng jongleh tolthia nathisah a noimigam najotsah ding ahi,” ati.
David jong apu apate toh akijam khomin, athitai, chule ama chu David khopia avuitauve.
Israelte chunga David lengvaipohna chu kum som li alhinge; kum sagi sungin Hebron khopia lengvai apon, Jerusalem khopia chun kum som thum le kum thum sungin lengvai anapoi.
Chuin Solomon chu apa David laltouna ahung toutan ahi; chule alenggam chu dettah-in akiphutdet tai.
Haggith chapa Adonijah chu Solomon nu Bathshe’ba henga ahungin ahileh, Bathshe’ba jongchun, “Lungdamsel a hung nahi hinai mo?” tin anadongin; aman jong, “Lung damsela hung kahinai” ati.
Chujouvin Adonijah chun aseiyin, “Keiman nahenga seinom them khat kaneiye,” atia ahileh; Bathshe’ba jong chun, “Seiyin seiyin,” tin asole.

Hijeh chun aman jong aseiyin, “Lenggam hi keiya ahin, chujongle Israel pumpi hin keima hi lengvaipoa pang dinga eikineppi cheh-u ahi, ti nangman nahet tei ding ahi; ahivangin hiche lenggam hi akihei mangin kasopipa achangtai; ijeh-inem itileh hiche hi Pakaiya hung kon ahitai.
Hijongle tun keiman naheng a thum nom khat kaneiye, kathum ding hi nei-it peh hih hel’ in,” ati. Amanun jong “Sei jengin,” ati.
Chuin aman aseitai, “Nahenga katao tho ahiye, nangman Solomon lengpa jah a thumle chun ama da thei louhel ding ahi, Shu’nam mi Abishag kitinu khu kaji din neithumpeh tan,” ati.
Hichun Bathshe’ba jong chun, “Apha lheh jenge, keiman lengpa henga naseipeh nange,” atitai.

Hijeh chun Bathshe’ba jong Adonijah khela thusei din Solomon lengpa henga alut tai; agalut chun lengpa jong anu kimutopi din ahung dingdoh-e; chujongle anu koma chun akunin salam abol’ in ahi. Chujouvin amajong alaltouna anung tou kit’in lengpa nu touna dingin jong touna khat ahindom lut tauve, chule amanu chu Solomon jetlama atouvin ahitai.

Hichun Bathshe’ban aseiyin, “Keiman nahenga thum nom thil, neo khat kaneiye, neidapeh hih hel’ in ong,” tin aseiye. Chuphat’in lengpa’n jong aseipaiyin, “He-nu, nathum nom chu thum jengin, keiman najah da peh ponge,” ati.
Hichun Bathshe’ba chun, “Shu’nam mi Abishag khu nasopipa Adonijah ji din petan,” tin aseitai.

Ahinla Solomon chun anu adonbut’in, “Ipi dinga Adonijah dia Abi’shag bou nathum ham? Adonijah dinga lenggam jong hi nathum jengle iti-am; ajeh chu ama hi kei dinga ka-ujo jong ahin, chule ama dinga panga hi Abi’athar thempupa le Zeru’iah chapa Jo’ab jong ahilhon me,” ati.
Chutah chun Solomon lengpa’n Pakai min apanin akihahsel’in aseiye, “Hiche thu kisei hi Adoni’jah-in athilo louva ahileh Pathenin keima chuti chun eibol jeng hen lang akhoh cheh jon jong eibol hen!

Tujenga jong keima hiche kapa David laltouna eitousah a eiphutdet pa, akitepna bang banga keima ei-inchen sah pa Pakai chu hing jing jeng ahin, ama min jala Adonijah kitipa hi tha tei tei ding ahi, tuni ma ma,” tin aseitai.
Hijeh chun Solomon lengpa’n Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah kitipa chu asol’in amanjong Adonijah chu asat lhuhel’in ama hichea hin athitai.

Chujouvin Abi’athar thempupa jah a chun lengpa’n aseipeh-in, “Nangma gamsunga Anathoth lama chetan, nang jong thi dinga kilom mong mong nahitai. Hijongle tutah hin keiman nathat ponge, ijeh-inem itileh nangman kapa David masanga Pathen thingkong naput peh-in, chujongle kapan hesoh genthei athoh jouse nathoh pin ahi,” ati.
Hiti hin Solomon chun Abi-athar jong Pakai thempua a pan muna konin ahaisah tai; hitobang hin Pakaiyin Shiloh khoa Eli insung thudola anasei athusei chu aguilhunsah tan ahi.

Jo’ab hin Ab’salom anapanpi lou vanga Adonijah hi anapanpi ahin, hitobang thusoh hi Jo’ab chun ajah doh phat chun Jo’ab jong Pakai ponbuh lama alhaijel’in maicham saki teni chu agatuh chah den jengin ahi.

Athilbol hi min Solomon lengpa jah a aseiphat’in, “Vetan, Jo’ab chu Pakai ponbuh sunga ajamlut’in, ven tunjong maicham panga aum nalaiye,” agati. Hichun Solomon in jong Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah chu asolin hitin ahil’e, “Chen lang Jo’ab chu gasat lum den tan,” ati.

Hijeh chun Benaiah kitipa chu Pakai ponbuh phunga ahungin Jo’ab jah a aseitai, “Lengpa thupeh dunguiyin, ‘Hung potdoh loiyin,’ kati nahi,” atia ahileh; Jo’ab chun, “Hung potdoh ponge, hikoma kathi den ding ahibouve,” ati. Chuphat’in Bena’iah kiti-pan jong lengpa henga thu amung lhut kit’in hi tin aseiye, “Jo’ab chun hitin eidonbut’in hitin thu aseiye,” agatia ahileh;
Lengpa’n jong adonbut’in; ajah a, “Ama sei bang bangin gathat denin lang hinvui tan, hitobang hin keile ka inkote chunga konin Jo’ab in ajeh beiya thisan asosah phu chu pailhan.

Pakaiyin achunga athisan so man chu guilhun sah jon tin, kapa David hetsah louva ama sanga dihjo le phajo mini jen adel khuma atha jeng, Israel sepai lamkaipa Ner chapa Abner le Judah sepaite lamkaipa Jether chapa Amasa anatha chu ama chunga aphu kilajonte.

Hitia hi amani thisan phu chu Jo’ab chungle a ma chilhah te chunga hung lhungin tin, beitih neilouvin umden jing jeng nante; amavang David le achilhahte ding, ainsung mite dingle alaltouna toute dingin Pakaiya konin atonsot atonsot geiya din chamna hung leng hen,” ati.
Chuphat’in Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah chu achetou pai paiyin Jo’ab chu agasat lhun a that tai; Jo’ab chu ama in ma ma gammang lah a chun avuitai.
Chuin lengpa’n Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah chu Jo’ab panmun khel’in sepaite lamkaiyin apansah tai, chule Zadok thempupa jong chu Abi’athar panmun khel’in apansah tan ahi.
Lengpan mi asol’in Shim’e-i chu agakousah-in, ajah a aseitai, “Jerusalem khopi sunga hin nangman in kisah denin lang chen nan neiyin, hichea kon chun potdoh datan, hoilai laiya jong chedoh ta hih-in.
Ajeh chu napotdoh pou pouva Kidron vadung nagalkai pou pou leh, nathi jeng ding ahi, ti kichentah-in kihet masah jengin; nathia ahileh nachunga nathisan phu chujo ding ahibouve,” atipeh-e.

Hijeh chun Shim’e-i jong chun lengpajah a aseiyin, “Nangman neiseipeh hi apha lheh jenge; kapu lengpa’n neihil bang bangin nasohpan bol nange,” a tin; hiti hin Shim’e-i chun abolin Jerusalema phat sot tah acheng den tan ahi.

Ahin kum thum nungin Shim’e-i soh mi ni ajam mang lhonin. Gath lengpa Ma’acah chapa Achish henga ajamlut lhon tai. Amani um chan hi min Shim’e-i jah a aseipeh phat’in, “Vetan, nasohteni chu Gath khopia aum lhone,” tin aseipeh-e,
Shim’e-i chu akipatdoh loiyin sangan chunga touna akidon, asoh teni hoi din Gath khopia Achish henga achetai. Hiti hm Shim’e-i chu Gath khopia achen asoh teni chu aganung puitan ahi,
Shim’e-i chu Jerusalem a konin Gath khopia achen ahung kile kit tai, tin min Solomon aseipeh tan ahileh,

Lengpa’n jong mi asol’in Shim’e-i chu agakousah-in chule ajah a aseitai, “Keiman nang hi Pakai min pana kakihahsel sah a, ‘Napotdoh a mundang hoikom hijongle nachedoh ni ni leh nathi tei tei ding ahi,’ tia kahil masah demsa nahilou ham’? Chule nangin jong kajah a naseiya. ‘Nangin neihilna hi keiman nit nange,’ tia naseisa ahimen.
Chuti ahileh ipi dinga nangman Pakaiya nakihahselna jong nit louva nauma, keiman kahilna kathupeh jeng jong nanit da hitam’?” tin adong tai.

Lengpan Shim’e-i jah a chun hitin jong aseiyin, “Nangin kapa David nabolna thilse jouse chu aboncha nalungthima nachin jing jeng ahin, Pakaiyin hitobang thilse nabol ho chu nang chunga hinnung chuhsah jo hen.
Solomon lengpa vang nun nom jing jeng hen lang, Pakai angsunga David laltouna chu kiphutdet jing jeng hen,” ati.

Chujouvin lengpa’n Jehoi’ada chapa Bena’iah chu thu a pen, amajong akondoh pai paiyin, Shim’e-i chu asat lhun ahileh ama athitai. Hitobang tah hin lenggam chu Solomon thahat nan akiphutdet cheh tan ahi.

Solomon chun Egypt lengpa Pharaoh toh kichenle kijonto aboltai; hiti hin Pharaoh chanu khat jin akipuiyin, David kulpi sunga akipui lut’in, ama in le leng inpi chule Pakai houin asah jou kah, Jerusalem kimvel pal aget jou kah chun kulpi sunga achenpin ahi.
Pakai mina houin akisah doh loulai jeh chun mipin munsang dunga chun kilhaina gantha abol jing jenguvin ahi.
Solomon hin Pakai angailun, apa David chonna dan jousea jong achon bukimsoh nai; amabou khomol dunga chun kilhaina gantha aboljin ahi,

Hijeh chun lengpa Solomon chu Gibeon khoa chun kilhaina gantha that din achetai; ijeh-inem itileh Gibeon kitilaiya hi khomol minthang pen tah um-ah ahin, Solomon chun hikoma hin pumgo thilto kilhaina gantha asang sangin agaboljin maicham chunga chun agagoujie.
Gibeon muna chun Solomon henga Pakai ajan mangin ahung kilah tai; hichea hin Pathen chun aseiyin, “Thumin ipipen tah kapeh ding nahim?” atin adonge.

Chuphat’in Solomon in jong aseiyin, “Kapa David nangma lhachapa chu nangin nasa tah-in nalungset’in, ama jong nang angsunga kitahna neitah le dihtah-in achonin, nangma dingin lung dih tah anapun ahi; hijeh chun nangin hitobang lungsetna nasa hi napen, tulai hin ama laltouna loa atouna tou ding chapa khat napetai.
Hiti hin tun vo Pakai ka-Pathen, keima chapang cha kahi vangin nangman kei hi nalhacha kapa David khel dingin leng neichansah tan ahi; hichea hin keiman vaikonje le vailhun je jong kahepoi,
Chule nalhacha keima tun namite mihem hijatpi lah a hin nangma lhendohsa ho lah a vaihom dingin kaume.

Hichejeh chun nangman nalhacha keima hi namite chunga vai kahom theina dingin thil hetkhen themna lung neipen, chutile keiman thilpha le thilse kahet khen thei ding ahi; achutilouva ahileh koiham hiche namite mi hijatpi vaihom thei dinga chu?” ati.
Solomon in hiche chihna athum hi Pakaiyin alung lhaipeh lhehjenge.

Hijeh chun Pathenin ajah a aseitai, “Nangman nangma hinkho sotna ding ham, nahaona ding ham, ahiloule namelmate suhmangna ding ham thumjo louva hitobang chihna nathuma, nangma changseh dinga thildih hetkhen themna nathum jeh hin,

vetan, keiman nasei bang banga kabolpeh ding nahi. Ven, keiman chihna le thil hetkhen themna lunggil napeng ting, nangma tobanga ching masanga jong anaum kha lou lai, khonung jongle nangma banga ching mihem hung umdoh kit lou ding ahi.
Nangman nathum loubeh jong kapeh ding nahi, haona le min najaholna ding jong napeng ting, hijeh a chu nahin laisea nang to tekah pithei leng dang khat’a khat jeng cha jong hung umdoh lou ding ahi.
Chutengle nangman jong napa David banga keima lamlhah jouse najui thema, kachonna dan jouse najui thema, chule kathupeh chengse nanit jinga ahileh ken jong nahin nikho kasao sah ding ahi,” ati.

Hichun Solomon aihmutna konin ahung khangin ahileh, vetan, hiche thusoh hi amang ahiye. Chuin Solomon jong ahungin Jerusalem a Pakai kitepna thingkong maiya adingin pumgo thilto le chamna kilhaina thilto gantha tampi abolin ahi, hichea chun asohte abonchan golvah abolpeh tan ahi.
Numei noti ni Solomon lengpa henga ahung lhonin amasanga ahung kidinte lhone.
Numei khatnu chun aseiyin, “Vo kapu, hiche numeinu hileh keima insung khat’a kacheng khom lhonin, ama insunga aumpet hin keiman cha khat kahingin,

chuin nithum lhin ni keiman cha kanei jou chun, hiche numeinu jong hin cha anei pai kit’e; ahin ainsunga chun midang aumpon, keini changseh bou kahi lhone, keini mi ni le le chubou insunga cheng kahi lhonin ahi.
Ahin hiche numeinu hin acha chu adelpha khah jeh-in janin acha chu athitai.

Hitichun nasohnu keima ka-ihmut lan kah chan amanu hi jan khangkim laiyin ahung thoudoh-in ka-angsunga konin kanao chu akidop mangin ama angsunga alumsah-in ama nao athisa chu kei angsunga ajamin ahi.

Chuin keima jingkah a kahung thodoh phat’in kanao chu vah dinga kagot’a ahileh, vetan athisa hi aumin, ahivangin jingkah khovah lhah chun phatecha kavetchil chet’a ahileh, vetan keiman kahin naosen chu hiche hi ahipoi,” ati.

Ahivangin numei khatjo nu chun aseiyin, “Ahipoi, naosen ahing nalai hi keima cha ahinan, athisa khu nang nao ahibouve,” ati tei teiye. Numei asei masanun aseipai kit’in, “Ahi hih-e, naosen thisa khu nang nao ahinan, naosen ahing nalai hi keima nao mong mong ahibouve,” ati kit tai. Hiti hin ama ni chu lengpa angsunga akinel lhonin ahi.

Chuphat’in lengpa’n jong aseiyin, “Khatnun la ‘Hiche naosen ahing nalai hi kei cha ahi, athisa khu nang cha ahi,’ tin aseiyin, chule khatnun jong, ‘Ahipoi, nang cha athitai, kei chapa chu hiche ahing nalai hi ahibouve,’ tin asei kit’in, ahi,” ati.
“Chuti ahileh chemjam khat hinchoi tem’uvin,” tin lengpa’n aseiye. Hijeh chun lengpa henga chemjam khat ahinchoi lut tauvin ahi.
Hichun lengpa’n jong aseipaiyin, “Hiche ahing nalai naosen hi kehni souvin lang alang khat chu numei khatnu khu peuvin, chutengle alang khatma chu khatjo nu khu petauvin,” atia ahileh;

chuphat’in achapa thilou numeinu joh chun lengpa jah a aseiyin, alungthima achapa alainatpi behseh phat chun, “Vo kapu, naosen chu that hih beh-in, ahing nalai naosen chu amanu khu petauvin,” atitai. Ahinla khatjo nu chun aseiyin, “Keila chang pong ting ama la chang deh pontin, tukehjeng tau,” tin aseitai.
Chuphat’in lengpa’n jong adonbut’in, “Numei amasajo nu chu naosen ahing nalai chu peuvin lang thada tauvin, amanu hi anu ahinai,” atin ahi.

Hichea lengpa thutan achaina abol hi Israel miten abonchauvin ajadoh soh keiyun, hijeh chun lengpa chu aging lheh jeng tauve; ijeh-inem itileh thu adih’a tanpehna thei Pathen chihna chu Solomon lengpa chunga um-ah ahitai, ti amudoh-u ahitan ahi.
Solomon chu Israel pumpi chunga lengvaipon anapangin,
chule ama noiya vaihoma pang ho chu hicheng hi ahiuve; Zadok chapa Azari’ah chu thempun anapangin,
Shisha chapa teni Elihor’eph le Ahi’jah chu lekhasun a pang ahilhone; Ahi’lud chapa Jehosh’aphat chu thuching lekha koiya pang ahin,
Bena’iah kitipa Jehoi’ada chapa chu sepaite lamkaiyin apangin, Zadok le Abi’athar chu them pun a pang lhone;
chujongle Azari’ah kitipa Nathan chapa chu thuneiho jouse chunga alamkai ahikit’e; Nathan chapa Zabud chu lengpa golpha tah-in jong apangin, thempun jong apange;
Ahi’shar chu leng inpi ngah-in ana pangin ahi. Chutengle Abda chapa Adoni’ram chu engbolna soh natonga kigoiho vetup’in apange.

Israel pumpi chunga thunei dingin Solomon chun mi som le ni akoiye; amaho hin lengpa le ainsung mite neh le chah ding angaitouva akisah lelpiu ahi; kum khat sunga hi thuneiya pang mi khat cheh hin lha khat sunga neh khop ding le neh le chah angaito cheh ahi.
Thuneiya pang ho chu aminu anoiya kiseiho hi ahi: Ephraim gamsunga cheng Hur chapa ahin, Ephraim thinglhanga mi ahi;
Deker chapa ahin, ama hin Makaz kho le Sha’albim kho jong, Bethshemesh kho jong, Aijalon kho jong apoh a Beth-hanan chan geiya thunei ahi.
Hesed chapa ahin, Arubboth khoa cheng ahi; ama dinga gambih kipe chu Socoh ahin, Hepher gamsungse toh ahithai;
Ahinadab chapa ahin, ama hin Dor lhangse se apon, Solomon chanu Taphath kitinu chu jin aneiye.

Ahi’lud chapa Baana ahin, ama hin Taanach khoa chenmun aneiyin, Megiddo kho toh akop jin, Jokneam gal lam geiyin jong apon, Jezreel noilam Beth-shean gam jouse jong apon, Beth-shean a kipat Zarethan koma kho Abel Meholah chan geiyin apon ahi.

Geber chapa jong ahin, ama hi Ramoth-gilead khoa mi ahin, ama gamsung hi Gilead gamsunga Manasseh chapa Jair ngahmun jouse jong ahi; chujongle Bashan gamsunga Argob lhangse se jong apoh than, kholen jeng jeng jong somgup alhingin, phatah-in pal akikai khumin chule sum-eng kelkotgol akigolden soh keiyin ahi.
Mahana’im khoa mi Iddo chapa Ahinadab ahi;
Naphtali gamsunga Ahimaaz kitipa chu ahin, ama jong hin Solomon chanu Base’math kitinu chu jin aneiye.
Asher gamsung lhangvuma cheng Hushai chapa Baana jong ahin,
chule Issachar gamsunga cheng Paruah chapa Jehosh’aphat ahi;
Benjamin gamsunga Ela chapa Shim’e-i jong ahin,
Gilead gamsung, masanga Amor mite lengpa Sihon gamsung le Bashan lengpa Og gamsunga thunei Uri chapa Geber jong ahiye. Chule Judah gamsunga thunei vaipoa pang mi khat jong aum nalaiyin ahi.
Judah mite le Israel mite chu mihem atam lheh jeng tauvin twikhanglena neldi jat apha tauve; miho hin adu du aneuvin atui tui adon uvin nom satah-in aumtauve.

Solomon chun lenggam jouse Euphrates luipi dunga pat Philistine te gamsung gei, Egypt gamgi chan geiyin lengvai anapon, hijeh chun mihon jong Solomon ahinlai sungsen kai apeuvin ama kinbol gunset’in anapanguve.
Nikhat sunga Solomon te neh le chah ding chu changbong neldisel ate-na dim som thum, neh ding thil dang ate-na dim somgup toh ahin,

bongchal thaotah tah som khat toh, hamhing lah a kivah thao chet bong som ni leh kelngoi ja khat toh ahin, hicheng lah a hi sakhi chal ho leh sangan ho jong kisimtha loulai, chule sakhigol pai ho leh ahcha thaotah ho jong kisim thalou ahi.

Ijeh inem itileh Solomon hin Euphrates lhum lam gamsungse se, Tiphsah a pat Gaza geiya lhang gamse se chunga vaipoh thaneina aneiya, Euphrates lhum lam gamsunga lenggam jouse chunga jong tha neisoh kei ahi; ahivangin Solomon in ajet le aveiya mite jouse chutoh chamna anei jing nai.

Chujongle Judah le Israel kah jenga jong Dan gama pat Beersheba geiyin cham alengin, lung mongin achenguvin, Solomon hinlaisen mitin ama ama lengpigui le atheichang phung lah a ingdei doiyin akichensoh kei’uve.
Solomon hin akangtalai ho koina ding sakolin sang som li jen aneiyin, chule sakol touthem sepai sang som le sang ni aneiye.
Chule Solomon le niseh a ama ankong phunga an ne dinga hung ho neh ding ngaitoa pang vaihom ho jong chun alhaseh chun ama ama panna dungjuiyin imacha alhasam beihel’in akoi neng jing jenguve.
Sakol chengse leh akeng jangkhai tah tah sakolte vahna dingin akhohna chan a ama ama ki-nganse dungjui cheh-in sakol chang le changpol jong ahinpo lut lut jeng jiuve.
Pathenin Solomon chu seithei kalval’in chihna le het khen themna lungthim apen, alung letdan chu twikhanglen panga neldi jat toh kikot hel in aume;
hijeh chun Solomon chihna hin solam mite chihna jouse jong akhokhel tan, Egypt gam mite chihna jouse jong akhokhel tai.

Hiti hin Solomon chu midang jouse sangin achingjo tan, Ezrah mi Ethan sangin jong aching jon, Mahol chapate Heman le Calcol chule Darda kitiho loi sanginjong gamchengin achingjon ahi; hijeh chun gam kim vela namtin lah a aminthang lheh jengin ahi.
Solomon hin thuchih jeng jong sang thum jen anaseidoh-in, alahol mong mong jong sang khat le nga alhinge.

Thing phung ho thudola jong ama hin Lebanon gama Cedar thing hoa pat pal chung dunga keh thei Hyssop ho thuchan geiyin anaseiye; aman gamsa ho thudol ahin, vachate thudol ahin, ganhing a-op’a kithol tho ho thudol ahin, chule nga ho thudol geiyin jong anaseisoh keiyin ahi.
Chuin mitin mitanga konle Solomon chihna thu japha chan leiset leng jousea konin Solomon chihna thusei ngai dingin ahung hung jenguvin ahi.
Tyre lengpa Hiram chun Solomon hi apa khela leng chang dingin thao akinutai, ti ajah doh phat’in Solomon henga dingin asohte asoltai; ijeh-inem itileh Hiram chun David analungset jing jeng ahi.
Hichun Solomon in jong Hiram henga dingin thu agah thot paiyin

“Kapa David chun Pakai a-Pathen min dingin in khat beh anasa joupoi, ti nangman nahet ahi; ijeh-inem itileh ama chu amelmaten aumkimsoh jing jenguvin, Pakaiyin amelmate chu akengto chotpha akoipeh masangsen choldona aneipoi.
Ahin tuhin Pakai ka-Pathen chun jet le veiya melmatea kona keima eikicholdo sah ahitan, kidoupi jong kaneipon, hamsetna jong katoh poi.

Hijeh chun keiman Pakai ka-Pathen min a din houin khat sah ding kagel’e; ajeh chu Pakaiyin kapa David jah a anaseiyin, ‘Keiman nang laltouna katousah ding nachapa chun keima min a houin khat ahinsah ding ahi,’ tin anaseiye.

Chuti ahijeh chun Lebanon lhanga cedar thing ho chu kei dingin neihin tuhpeh sah tan, chutengle keima sohte jong nangma sohte chutoh hung pangkhom“uvin tin, nangin natuhjat jat chu keiman nasohte thaman kapeh ding ahinai; ijeh-inem itileh nangin nahetsa jing bang hin eiho lah a Sidon mite banga inthil suithem mihem aum poi,” ati.

Hiram chun Solomon thu thot chu ajah doh phat’in akipah behseh jengin ahileh hitin aseitai, “Hiche mipi tamtah Israel chunga vaihom dinga David sunga chapa ching tah khat hinpen sah a Pakai chu tunin nun nom hen,” ati.

Chujongle Hiram chun Solomon henga dingin thu athot’in hitin aseiye, “Nangin keima henga thu nahin thot chu kajatai, nangman cedar thing le chahthing nadei bang banga aboncha bolpeh soh kei dingin keima kigosa kahitai.

Inthil chengse chu kasohten Lebanon lhanga konin twikhanglen geiyin hintol suh uvin tin, chutengle nangman nalhutna nom noma chu keiman twikhanglen chunga puma kahintol sah ding ahin, aki-ngahna ding muna chu ka-ngah peh a nangin hikoma kona chu nakilah ding ahi; thil dang sangin ka insung mite neh ding neipe le chun kitoh jengin te,” atin ahi.
Hitobang hin Hiram chun Solomon in adei dei inthil chu cedar thing hihen chahthing hijongle a pen ahi;
chule Solomon in jong Hiram insung mite neh dingin suhlou chang ate-na dim sang som ni le thaotwi kiheh lhasa ate-na sang som ni dimset apei; Solomon in thil hijat hi kumseh a Hiram apeh jing ahi.
Pakaiyin atep bang bangin Solomon chu chihna apen, hijeh chun Solomon le Hiram kah a jong cham analenge; hichea hin amanin kigahna khat anasemdoh lhon tai.
Solomon lengpa’n Israel mipi lah a konin ada acham louva natong dingin mi athouvin, hitobanga ada acham louva natong dinga kimandoh chengse chu mihem sang somthum alhinguvin ahi.

Amaho hi sang som somin Solomon chun Lebanon langa asol jin, lha khat sungin Lebanon a na agatonguvin chujou tengleh lha ni sungin ina ahung kicholdo jiuvin ahi; hichea engbolna natong ho vetup hin Adoniram kitipa chu apangin ahi.
Solomon in thing lhang gamsung jenga jong chun thilgih pole ding mihem sang som sagi akoiyin, song khengthem jeng jong mihem sang som get akoiye;
hichea hi Solomon in apansah vaibol len cheh le natohna chunga thu neiya pang, mipi natong vetup’a pang ho jong kisimtha loulai ahiuve.
Lengpa thupeh dunguiyin mihon song len tah tah ho leh song mantam tah tah ho chule akikhengjolsa ho chu inbul patdohna dingin akaldoh doh jenguvin ahi.
Hitobang hin Solomon dinga insa them miho le Hiram dinga insa them mihon chujongle Gebal miho chun song akhenguvin, inthil asuiyun, song ahol’uvin in sah ding angaitouve.

Israel chate Egypt gama kona ahung potdoh joukal kumja li le kum som get lhin kum, Israelte chunga Solomon lengvaipoh jou kum li lhin kumin, lha ni lhinna Ziv lha sungin Solomon in Pakai houin ding asapan tan ahi.
Pakai houin dinga Solomon lengpa ingon chu adung tong somgup alhingin, avai tong som ni ahin, chule tong somthum asange.
Ain kimlai don tah a hongcha kihoi chu tong som ni asaovin, ainvai chutoh akibange; chujongle ainmai lam chu tong som khat athuh-e.
Solomon in houin bangkot dunga pansah din jong thilgol tampi asemin ahi.
Inbang kimvel le inbang lhungkeiya kigolphei dingin doson asemin, alailung le muntheng dan sung nung kimvel geiyin jong doson asempeh-in ahi; jet le veiya jong dokhang adon ahi.

Dan noinungpen chu tong nga alhingin, akimlaiya dan chu tong gup alhingin, danthum lhinna chu tong sagi ahin, indouna injol chengse chu insunga ahung kithol lut pai louna din inpo lama chun kalbilei akidotouvin ahi.

Houin chu akisah pet’in song ho jeng jong akilaidoh pet’a kikheng tohsa ahin, hijeh chun in kisah lai sungsen jong sehcha kivopoh ham, heicha kitupoh ham ahiloule thih manchah kimanga kivopoh husa imacha akijadoh hih hel’e.
Indan noinungpen a lutna ding kot chu in bang lhanglama akihoiye; miho chu akimlai jon a kalbileiya kaltouva, chujou tengleh adan lailha a kona danthum lhinna a kaltouji ahiye.
Hitobang hin Solomon chun houin anasan asajou tai; chule inchung noidal dingin thinglhon ho leh cedar thing khunpeh ho chu amangin ahi.
Chujongle inpi chutoh kimai ngat ton doson asemin, indan khat cheh chu tong nga ngan asangin, hiche indan chengse chu cedar thinga kisui inthil dang ho chutoh akijopmat soh keiyin ahiye.
Pakaiyin Solomon henga thu ahinseiyin hitin aseiye,

“Nangman hiche houin hi nasah ahitan, hichea kona nangin keima chonna dan jouse najuiya, kachondan jouse le kathupeh jouse nanit soh keiya, hichengsea kisei banga nachon a, najui them leh keiman napa David jah a kaseisa kathusei chu nangma chunga katahso tei tei ding ahi.
Hitia chu keima Israel chate lah a kachen a, kamite Israelte hi kadalhah louhel ding ahi,” ati.
Hiti hin Solomon chun houin anasan asajou tai.

In bang chengse jong chu asung lam achung gol cedar thing thingpeh-in abeh mat soh keiyin, alhonga pat chung lam innoidal gei, ainsun chan geiyin asung lamse se chu thingpeh akhunal soh keiyin, alhong jouse jong chah thing khunpeh adon ahi.
Intom lam jong chu alhonga pat insun geiyin cedar thing khunpeh tongsomin asemin, chule hiche lai hi aman muntheng chung nungpen kiti indan dinga chu anasem ahi.
Houin indan theng muntheng akimlai tah amai chu tong som li asaove.
Insunga kimang cedar thing chu umga leng tobangle pahcha apah lha ding kon banga kijempol ahin, aboncha cedar thing jeng jeng ahi; song him him akimudoh poi.
Pakai kitepna thingkong koina din jong indan sung nung langpeh a jong chun dan theng sung nung kiti khat asemin ahi.

Dantheng sung nung chu tong som ni asaovin, tong som ni ma alenin, tong som ni ma ma asangin ahi; indan pumpi chu sana thengselin atomjol soh keiye. Chule cedar thing jengin maicham khat jong asemdoh tai.
Chule Solomon in indan sung lam chu sanatwi thengsel’in aloinal’in, dantheng sung nungpa maiya chun sanagui teni ajenpel ton, sana ma man atomjol’in ahi.
Chujongle houin pumpi chu sanan atomjol jengin, abonchan aloijol soh kahsen aloi loi jenge. Chule dantheng sungnunga maichamjong apumpin sanajengin atomjol’in ahi.
Dantheng sung nunga hin Olive thingin asuiyin Cherub lim ni aseme; khat khat chu tong som khat cheh asangin ahi.
Cherub khat chu alha lang khat tong nga alhingin, alang khat alha jong chutima man tong nga ma alhinge; hijeh chun alha mong lang khat’a pat alang khat lha mong geiyin tong som alhingset’e.
Hitobang hin Cherub khat jong chu tong som ma alenin, Cherub teni hi aletdan jong aneodan jong akibang gel’in, chule agongso jong tha khat chet ahilhone.
Cherub khat chu asandan tong som alhingin khatjoh jong chu chule ma ma ahi.

Solomon in Cherub teni chu indan sung nung langpeh a atungin; Cherub teni chu alha lhon akijalsoh keiyin, Cherub khat lhaving chun bang lang khat aphan, Cherub khatjoh lha ving jong chun bang lang khatma aphan ahi; chutengle alha lang khatgel lhon chu alaiya alhaving le alhaiving akitong kha to lhonin ahi.
Solomon in Cherub teni jong chu sanan atomjol sel jengin ahi.
Inbang apumpin ajempah soh keiyin, akimvel lhung keiyin Cherub lim le tumthing lim asemin, pahcha lim jong asemin, indan sung lam le apolam hitobang cheh chun abolsoh keiye.
Chutengle alhong jong chu asung apo kibangin sanan bou atomjol’in ahi.
Dantheng sung nunga lutna dingin Solomon chun Olive thing jengin kotpi asemsoh keiyin, kot chunga ajolpa leh akotpi khom chengse chu agomin nga jen alhinge.

Olive thinga kisem kotpi teni chu Solomon in Cherub lim le tumthing lim chule pahcha lim sem nan amang cheh-in, abonchan sanan atomjol soh keiyin, Cherub lim kisem ho le tumthing lim kisemho chunga jong chun sanatwi athekhumin ahiye.
Houin kimlai lunga lutna ding kotpi khom ho jong chu aning li neiya Olive thing jenga kisem ahin, hitobang bang hin asemin ahi.
Chahthinga kisem kotpi ni alhingin, kotpi khat’a ajet aveiya kotpeh teni chu akilhep theigel ahi; chutobang ma chun kotpi khatpa jong ajet aveiya akotpeh teni akilhep thei cheh-in ahi.
Akotpeh chung dunga hin Cherub lim le tumthing lim chule pahcha lim jeng jeng ajempol soh keiye. Chule a bonchan sanan atomjol’in, akijepna dung geiyin jong sana aloinat soh keiyin ahi.
Houin lailung alhong chu song khensa gol thumin asen, chule cedar thing inkamdet din gol khat man ajam nalaiye.
Kum li lhin kum, Ziv lha sungin houin mun alaiyin ato akisapan tai.

Kum som le kum khat lhin na, lha get lhin nan, Bul lha sungin houin chu abih bih-in akigong tohsoh keiyin, agon bang bangin akiphutdoh soh tai. Solomon in hiche houin sahna hin kum sagi alutsah in ahi.
Solomon chun ama chenna ding in jong kum som le kumthum jen lut’in anasan, ain pumpi ajou thenghel’e.

Lebanon gammang thinga kisa kiti kikhopna in khat jong Solomon in anasai; adung tong jakhat alhingin, avai tong som nga alhinge, chule asandan tong somthum alhingin ahi; akisah dan chu cedar thing khompi golthuma kigola hiche cedar thing khom chunga ma chu cedar thingma ma inkama kijam cheh kit nalai ahi.
Khompi somli le nga chunga indan kisem chengse chung jong chu cedar thingin akikhu kit’e.
Golthum thuma chun bangkot gol akigol phei peh peh-in, bangkot chu thum cheng chengin khat le khat aki-ang ngat to cheh-uvin ahi.
Kotpi jouse leh bangkot jouse chun akol ning li cheh aneiyun, bangkot thum cheh-in akimai ngat to cheh-uve.

Solomon in khompi jeng aphut’in kikhopna in khat jong asan, asaodan tong som nga alhingin, aletdan availam tong somthum alhinge; khompi chengse maiya chun hongcha khat akisemin, chule amasang lam’uva tunpi khat akisunge.
Solomon chun thu chaina phondohna ding atin, laltouna kellim khat jong asan, hichu thutanna kellim jong asah-in ahi; hiche in hi alhonga pat ainsun geiya cedar thing jenga kisadoh peh ahiye.

Achenna dinga ama changseh in dinga akisah chu hiche kikhopna in anunglama chun akisan, akisah dan chu khut them kivetna mong monga kisa abang jenge. Solomon in akichenpia aji dinga akipuisa Pharaoh chanu ding jong chun hiche in tobang khatma hi anasahpeh-e.

Hichengpi hi aboncha song mantam jenga kisem, adung avai kitetoh cheh a kikheng, songthola kitholnal cheh ahin, anung ama kibang cheh a kisema, abulpia kipat alukhuh geiya kibol toh cheh ahin, Pakai insung lhonglaiya pat’a inpi lhonglen lai geiya hitia hi kibol ahi.
Inbulpi kisah patna song ho chu song mantam tah tah ahin, song lentah tah ahi, chule asong ho chu tong get a lhah tong som gei cheng jeng ahiuve.
Chule achung lama pang jong chu song mantam jeng leh kitetoh chet’a kikhengsa song jeng ahin, cedar thing jong apange.

Chule indanlen lhong laiya chun akimvel lhung keiyin song khentohsa golthumin akigolin, chule cedar thing inkam bangin gol khat’in akigol’e; hitobanga hi Pakai indan sung nung lhong jong, ainpi hongcha jong kibolsoh kei ahi.
Solomon lengpa’n mi asolin Tyre khoa konin Hiram agapuisah tai.

Hiram hi Naphtali phunga mi meithainu chapa khat ahin, apa vang chu Tyre gama mi, sum-eng kheng them khat ahi; ama chu miching tah le thil hetkhen them, sum-eng khena jong khut themtah mihem khat ahi. Hiram chu Solomotl lengpa heng ahung lhun phat’in hiche akhut themna jouse chun thil aboltai.

Hiramin sum-eng jengjengin khompi ni jen alhan, akhompi chu sang tah ahin asandan tong som le tong get alhinge; akhom kimvel chu akiteleh tong som le ni ahin, ahomin, ageisa dol jong khutjung li tejen alhingin ahi; khompi anina jong chu chutobangma ma ahi.
Khompi teni chunga tun dingin sumeng kilhajol ma’ man alujumin pahcha bangin asemin, khom lujum khat chu asandol tong nga ahin, khom lujum khatjoh jong chu tong nga ma asangin ahi.

Chuin Hiram chun khompi lujum teni jepna dingin sum-eng gui lencha kipheh bangin nijen apheh-in, hiche sumeng kipheh khat chu khompi lujum khat’a ding chu ahin, sum-eng kipheh khatjoh jong chu khompi lujum khatjoh a dingma chu ahiye.
Hitobang hin Hiram chun kolbuthei pah lim jong aseme; sum-eng kipheh khomlujum chunga chun golni nin agolin, abonchan ja li alhingin, khompi khatjoh dingin jong chutobangman asempeh-e.
Hongcha khompi chengse chung aluvuma chun pahcha lim jeng akisemin, tong li li asao cheh-in ahi.

Khompi lujum kisempeh teni chu khompi teni chung, lencha pheh banga kipheh sum-eng gui kiveina koma chun akitotdoh-e. Kolbuthei pah lima kisem jeng jeng ja ni alhingin, akimvela got nin akigol’in, khom lujum a jong chun chutiman akiseme.
Chuin khompi chengse chu houin hongcha a atungdoh pai paiyin, lhang lama jong khompi khat aphutdoh-in amin Jachin asah-e; chutengle sah lama jong khompi khatma aphutdoh kit’in amin Bo’az asahin ahi.
Khompi teni chungvuma chun pahcha jem akisemin, hiti hin khompi kibol chu akichaisoh tai.
Hiram chun twikong lenpi khat sum-engin alhan, abempel jengin, agei lang khat’a pat alang gei chan chu tong som alhingin, tong nga asangin, akolvel pumpi chu tong somthum alhingin ahi.

Ageinoi gol achun umtam lim tampi akisemphei peh jengin, kongpi kimvel tong somthum lhung keiya chu kisem lhung kei ahin, umtam lim kisem ho chu gol nin akigol’e; twikong akilhahjol pet’a hichengse chutoh kilhah tha ahitai.

Twikong chu bongchal som le ni chunga akiluiyin, bongchal thumin sahlam angan, bongchal thum man nilhum lam angan, bongchal thum ma man lhang lam angan chule bongchal thumin niso lam angan ahi; twikong chu hiche bongchalte chunga hi kiluiya chule abongchalte chu atolamu akisuhto sah-uva asung lama um cheh ahi.
Twikong sadan chu khutphang te jen ahin, agei jong khon gei kisempeh banga kisem ahin, pahcha pah bangin akisemin, atwikong chun twi te-na sang ni jen adol’e.
Hiram chun sum-engin khomtodal som khat asemin, khomtodal khat cheh chu tong li li asaovin, tong li li ma alenin, tong thum asange.
Khomtodal chengse kisemdol chu hiti hi ahi: khomtodal jouse chun amaitom anei cheh uvin, hiche amaitom chengse chu akol sung dunga kihenglut kit’ a ahi;

chujongle akol sung dunga kiheng lut hiche amaitom dunga hin sakei bahkai lim le bongchal lim chule Cherub lim tampi akisemin ahi. Akol chung dung, sakei bahkai le bongchal lim kisemho chungle noiya chun thih-hat’a kigot tohsa pahcha lim jong akisemin ahi.

Khom todal khat cheh chun sum-eng chaokol li li leh sum-eng jol li li anei cheh-uve. Aning li laiya chun kisilna kong kitunna ding khom akiphut cheh-in, hiche akhomho jong hi akilhah tho cheh ahin, ajet aveiya pahcha lim toh kilhah tha cheh ahiuve.

Ako jong aumin akihondoh a ahileh chung lam angan, athuh dan chu tong khat athuh-e; akihondohna akam chu abemin, khom tunlutna dinga kisem ahijeh chun tong khat le tongkeh athuh-in ahi. Akihonna a jong chu pahcha akisemin, amai tomna jong aning li neiya kibol ahin, abempoi.

Sum-eng chaokol li chu amaitomna noiya chun akibat’in, chule chaokol sunga kithilpai sum-eng jol chengse chu akhomtodal chengse chutoh tikhat bangin aumuve; chaokol khat cheh chu asandol tong khat le tongkeh alhinge.

Hiche chaokol ho hi kangtalai velkol ho tobanga khu kisem cheh ahiuvin, ajolpia pang ho ahin, aveltomna ahin, avel le ajolpi kah a kipheh thihjang ho ahin, chule alaiya athihjang jouse kisuhtona avelbem ahin aboncha akilhahjol tho jeng ahiuve.
Khomtodal khat cheh a chun aning lia akingapna ding li cheh aumin, akingapna chengse le akhomtodal chengse jong chu tikhat tobang bang ahiuve.
Khom todal chunga chun akola kivei khat khao tobangin aumin, tongkeh khat ahung sangdoh-e; chutengle khomtodal chunga akibuna dingleh amaitomna ho jong chu tikhat bangin akisemthai.

Akibuna ding amai dungle amaitomna dunga jong chun aman Cherub lim ho leh sakei bahkai lim sem nan chule tumthing phung lim ho sem nan amangin, adol le adol lou dungjuiyin asemin, akimvela chun pahcha jeng asempeh-in ahi.
Chujouvin hitobang asem chaisoh phat chun akhomtodal som khat asemin, aboncha chu kibang cheh a kilhajol ahin, alet le aneo jong akibangin, alimle agong jong akibang cheh-e.

Kisilna ding jong sum-eng kong som khat asemin, kisilna kong khat cheh chun twi te-na som li li adol’in, kisilna kong khat cheh chu tong li alhing cheh-in, khomtodal khat cheh ding chun kisilna kong khat cheh akikoiye.

Chuin khomtodal chengse chu atungdoh soh keiyin, houin lhang lama chun khomtodal nga aphut’in, houin sah lama jong khomtodal nga ma aphutdoh-e; chule lhanglam niso lam houin ninga chun twikong chu adoi.

Hiram chun bel ho jong leilona ho jong, twibel ho jong asemsoh keiye; hiti hin Hiramin Solomon lengpa panpina Pakai houin sahna ding chung changa atohpeh ding jouse chu abonchan atong soh hel tan ahi.

Khompi teni ahin, khompi teni tomna dinga alujum kisem teni ahin, chule alujum lai teni tomna dinga sum-eng chaokol jet a kijel teni ahin, lenchapheh a kipheh a khompi teni lutomna kimang teni jong ahin,

lenchapheh banga kipheh teni dinga kisem kolbuthei pah tobang ja li jen ahin, khompi teni lutomna dinga kibol lenchapheh banga kipheh khat cheh a pang dia golnia ding kolbuthei pah kisem chengse chutoh ahi.
Khomtodal som khat ahin, khomtodal chunga pang ding twibel som khat jong ahi;
chujongle twikong khat ahin, hiche twikong kisem noiya chun bongchal som le ni lim akiseme.
Bel ho ahin, leilona ho ahin, kisilna kong ho ahin, Pakai insunga kimang kongle bel jouse hi Hiramin Solomon lengpa dinga anasem a, sum-eng jenga analhah ahi.
Jordan vadung pang phaicham lah a Succoth le Zarethan kikah a bellei kimuna dunga chu lengpa’n analhah ahiye.
Kong le bel atam behseh phat’in Solomon in tetoh louvin aban umsah gamtan ahi; hijeh chun sum-eng chengse chu ijat monga gih hi ding ham, ti hetdoh louvin aumlo tai.
Solomon in Pakai houin sunga manchah ding thil le to asem chengse chu hicheng hi ahi: sana maicham ahin, kilhaina ding changlhah todohna ding dokhang ahin,

sana thengsela kisem thaomei khom ahin, insung dan muntheng maiya akitungin lhanglam ngan abah nga akitungin, sah lam ngan bah nga ma akitunge; pahcha lim kisem le thaomei ho ahin, cheiche chengse chutoh ahin, sana jeng jeng ahiuve;

akhon chengse le thaomei jang chengse toh, kisilna kong ho le gimnamtui halna lheng ho jong ahin, khangbel jong ahin, aboncha chu sana jenga kisem ahi; chujongle muntheng chung nungpen kiti lai, houin dan sung nung pen a kotpi dunga akotbil ding jong sana jeng ahin, houin lailunga kotpi kotkil jouse jong sana ma ma ahicheh-e.

Hitobang hin Pakai houin sahna chung changa Solomon lengpa’n abol ding jouse chu abolsoh tan, akichai soh hel tai. Chujongle Solomon chun apa David’in athensosa thil jouse ahinpo lut pai paiyin, dangka jong, sana jong kong le bel jouse jong abonchan Pakai houin sunga thil kholna insunga akhol khomsoh tan ahi.

Solomon in Israel upate abonchauvin Jerusalem a akoukhomsoh keiyin, Zion a David kulpi sunga kona Pakai kitepna thingkong potou dingin Israel phung jousea konin phung upa chengse jong akouvin, Israel chate lah a ama ama pajang lhah cheh a thalheng akhomin ahi.
Hijeh chun Israel mite abonchauvin lha sagi lhinna, Eth’anim lha sungin Solomon masanga golvah bol dingin ahung kikhomsoh hel’uvin ahi.
Israel mite upa ho ahung kikhop kimsoh phat’uvin thempuhon thingkong chu apu uvin akipatdoh tauve.
Thempuho hin Pakai thingkong jong ahinpo touvun, kikhopna ponbuh le asunga kikoi thil theng jouse jong ahinpouve; thempuho leh Levi mihon hichengse chu ahinpoh tou u ahiye.

Hichun Solomon lengpa leh amasanga kikhom Israel khoppi pumpin Solomon chutoh thingkong maiya chun kikhopna asemuvin, kelngoi tamtah le bongchal tamtah-in kilhaina abol’uvin, aganthau chu a tam behseh jengin simjou jai ahitapoi.
Hichun thempuhon Pakai kitepna thingkong chu akitunna ding mun, houin sunga indan sung nung muntheng lai, muntheng chung nungpen kitilai, Cherub teni lhaving lim noiya chun ahin pulut’uvin ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh Cherub teni hin thingkong chunga hi alhaving te ajah lhona ahileh thingkong dinga chu abuh lima pang lhona, akiputna moljol teni geiya jong alim noi lhona um-ah ahitai.

Moljol teni chu asao behseh jengin, among lam chu indan muntheng sunga konin jong akimupha peh nalaiye; ahinla polama konin vang akimudoh deh sam hih nai; tuni geiyin hiche moljol teni chu hikoma chun aumden jing nalai lhone.

Hiche thingkong sunga hin imacha dang aumpoi, Horeb molsanga Mose’n anakoi song pheng ni thusom kisutna chubou um ahi; hiche laiya hi Pakaiyin Israel chate Egypt gamsunga kona ahung potdoh laiyuva kitepna anasempi ahi.
Thempuho chu muntheng phunga kona ahung potdoh phat’uvin Pakai houin chu meilhang khat’in ahintom pai jengin ahi;
meilhang hung kaijeh chun thempuho jong houin kinbol dingin apang ngam tapouve; ijeh-inem itileh Pakai loupina chu Pakai houin sung adimset jengtai.
@@Hichun Solomon ama le ama akihouvin hitin aseitai: “Pakaiyin vanlaijol a nisa akoiyin, Amanla muthim lhangkhal lah a bou kachen ding ahi, ati.
Nangma tonsot geiya nachenna dingin, @Keiman inhoi tah khat kasah peh tai,” atin ahi.
Hichun khoppi mipi abonchan ading toh chet’uvin, lengpa ahung kiheiyin khoppi mipi chu abonchauvin phatthei aboh tai.
Hichea hin Solomon lengpa’n aseitai, “Pakai Israel Pathen chu nun nom hen, aman akamsung tah a kapa David jah a anaseisa chu akhut tah-in aguilhunsah tai; hichea hin aman anaseiyin hitin ati,

’Keiman kami Israelte hi Egypt gama kona kahin puidoh nikhoa pat chun keima min kiphah jingna dingin Israel phung hijat lah a hin khopi dang khat’ a khat jeng cha jong kalhen aumpoi, hiche khopia chu keima dinga in kisahna ding tin, ahinla kamite Israel chunga vaihom dingin David hi kalhengin ahi,’ ati.
Hichea hin Pakai Israel Pathen min phah jingna dinga in khat sah doh ding hi kapa David lungthima anaum jing jenge.
Ahinla Pakai chun kapa David jah a anaseiyin, ‘Nalungthima hin keima min a houin khat sah ding nagel jing jengin, hiche nagel hi phavang apha lheh jeng nai;
ahivangin nangma tah hin hiche nagel houin hi nasah doh jou louhel ding ahin, hin nangman nahin ding nachapan keima min a hiche houin hi ahinsah doh ding ahibep nalaiye,’ ati.

Tuhin Pakaiyin athutepsa chu aguilhunsah tan ahi; ajeh chu keima kapa David khel in kapang tan, Pakai thutep bang bangin Israel laltouna chunga katoutai; chujongle Pakai Israel Pathen dingin keiman houin chu kasadoh tan ahi.

Chule hiche houin sunga hin keiman thingkong tunna ding jong kaseme; hiche thingkong sunga hi Pakai kitepna chu um ahiye, hiche kitepna hi Pakaiyin Egypt gamsunga kona ipu ipateu ahinpuidoh laiya amaho chutoh kitepna aneiya anasem ahi,” ati.
Solomon chu Israel khoppi pumpi maiya adingin, akhut tenin van lam asangin,

chule aseitai, “Vo Pakai Israel Pathen, nangma banga a-angsunga lhale jing alhachate dinga akitepna nit jing jenga long louva lungsetna nei jing jeng thei, chunga van a hihen lang hinoi leiset’a hijongleh pathen dang aumpoi.
Nangman vang kapa David koma naphondohsa chu nalhachapa ama henga nasei bang bangin nanit jing jenge; adih mongin nangman nakama naseidoh ahin, nakhut tah-in namolso tai.

Hijeh chun tun jong O Pakai Israel Pathen, nangman kapa David nalhachapa jah a naseisa chu nit jingin, hichea chun nangin hitin naseiye, ‘Keima angsunga nang dinga Israel laltouna hung tou ding mihem hung bei louhel ding ahi, nachapaten achotna diu alam lhah-u akivet them’uva, nangma keima masanga nava le jing banga amaho jong keima masanga ava le jing pou uva ahileh,’ tia naseisa chu.
Chuti ahijeh chun tu hin vo Israel Pathen, nangman kapa David nalhachapa henga naseisa nathusei chu sudet tan.

“Ahivangin Pathen chu leiset chunga cheng mong mong ding hinam? Vetan, van kiti, hiche van chung asang pen tah jong khun nangma nadolponte: chuti ahileh keiman kasahdoh hiche houin hi iti neova neo ding hi tam!

Hijengjongleh O Pakai ka-Pathen, nalhachapa keima taona le kathumna hi neigel khohpeh tei teiyin, tunia nalhachapa keiman nangma angsunga taona kahin nei hi kap’a katao jengna hi neijah peh tei teiyin;

chutileh asun ajan a hiche houin hi namit tenia navet jing jenga, ‘Hikoma hi kamin kiphapoh jing jeng ding ahi,’ tia naseina navet jing thei ding; hitia hi hikom muna nalhachapa keima kahung taona ji ho hi nangman neinop peh thei ding ahi.

Hikom muna hi nalhachapa keima le namite Israel ahung tao teng nangman jong katao nau neisanpeh jiuvin; ahiye, nangman nachenna van a konin kataonau hin ngaiyin lang, kataonau najah teng leh nei ngaidam’uvin.
“Mihem khattou achonset’a aheng akom douna thil abolset ham jeh a kihahsel sah dinga akikoi teng, ama chu hiche maicham phunga hi nangma angsunga kihahsel dinga ahung tengleh,

nangman van a konin hin ngaiyin thil hinbol jengin, nalhachate thu hintanpeh jengin lang, mithemmopa chu athepmona ama chunga chuhsah jengin mona pen, chule midihpa chu adihna dungjuiyin ama chu dihman pen lang vetsah temin.
“Achonsetjeh-uva namite Israel hin agalteu masanga gal alel tengu jongleh, nangma henga ahung kihei kit’uva namin ahinphah uva hiche houin sunga hi taona aneiyuva thil athum’uva ahileh;
nangman van a konin hin ngaiyin lang, namite Israel chonsetna hinngaidam jengin, chule nangman apu apateu napehna gamsunga hin hin puilut kit jeng tan.

“Van kot akikha teng go ajuji tapoi, ijeh-inem itileh Israelte chu nangma dounan achonse jiuvin ahi; hichea chu nangman nabol gim tengleh amahon achonset aphondoh uva naheng lama ahung kihei kit theiyuva namin pan a hikoma hi ahung tao tengu leh,

nangman van a konin hin ngaiyin namite Israel nalhachate chonset hin ngaidamin, chule nangman amaho chu achena diu lampi pha nahil ding ahiuve; chujongle nangman hitia hi agoulo diuva namite napehsa gamsunga jong gotwi nalhahsah ding ahi.

“Israelte gamsunga hi kel ahung lhah a, gamna hise ahung lan a, thinglung ahung hat’a, thing jouse amotsoh a, khaokhote ham lungkangte ham ahung lan a ahijongleh; achennau khopi khatpen pen a hi amelmateuvin ahin umkhum jenguva, gamna hise itobang ahung lan jenga, itobang natna hijong leh ahung lhun teng,

taona itobang hihen itobang thumna hijongleh mihem khatseh ahung tao ham mipi namite Israel ahung taovu ham ahijongleh, koi koi ahiya alungthim sunga agimna akihet’a hiche houin lam hi asan a ahung tao pou pouva ahileh,

nangman van nachenna konin hin ngaipeh-in lang, ngaidamin, amitin ama ama lungput nahetpeh dungjui bang cheh chun thil hinbolpeh tei teiyin, ama ama lamlhah nahetpeh bangin na tohpeh tan, ajeh chu mihem chate lungthim jouse hesoh nangma le le nahin, nangin bou nahetsoh ahi;
chutileh Israel ten jong nangman apu apateu napehna hiche gamsunga achen laiseuva nangma nagin diu ahi.
“Hitobangma a chu namite Israel lah a mi hilou gamla tah a kona gamdang mi jong nangma min ngaicha ahunga ahileh,
ajeh chu mihon nangma min kithang ajah uva, naban thahatje ahetdoh diu, chule naban thahat kilhungdoh thusim ajah dingu ahin, chutengleh hitobang mi chu ahunga hiche houina hi ahung taova ahileh,

nangman nachenna van a konin hin ngaiyin lang, ipi hijongle hiche gamdang mipan adeiya athum chu abonchan adei bang bangin bolpeh tei teiyin, chutihen lang hileh leiset mitin vaipi hin nangma min hedoh soh intin, nangma nagin cheh diu, namite Israel ten abol bang banga abol diu ahi; chujongle keiman kasah doh hiche houin hi nangma min a kivo ahitai, ti jong ahetdoh thei diu ahi.

“Namite hi akidoupi agalteu toh kisat dinga hoikom lampi hijeng jong leh nangman nasol solna achetengu, hiche nangman nalhentum khopi, keiman nangma min dinga houin kasahna lam hi angat’uva ahung tao uva ahileh,
nangman van a konin ataonau le athil thum u ngaipeh tei teiyin lang, amaho dihna chu panpi tei teiyin.

“Mihem hi achonselou beihel ahijeh-in, ijemtia amaho achonset’uva nangma doumah abol’uva, hijeh a chu achunguva nangma nalung hana, agalteu khut’a amaho napeh doh a, hichea kona hi gamla hihen lang nailam hijongleh amelmateu gamsunga soh chang dinga min akai mang tengu,

hichea min soh changa akaimang nau gamsunga aum nauva hi alungthimuva kisihna aneiyuva alung akhel theiyuva, soh a hen mite gamsunga chu taona aneiyuva hitia hi asei theiyuva, ‘Keiho kachonseuvin adih loulam le agilou lamin na katong tauve,’ tia aseiyuva,

amaho soh chang dia kaimang mite gamsunga chu alung gil jouseu leh alungthim pumpi akheljenguva, nangman apu apateu napehna agamsungu hi asan’uva, nalhentum khopi hi asan’uva, nangma min kiphahna dinga hiche keima houin sah hi ahinsan’uva ahung tao uleh,
nangman nachenna van a konin ataonau le athumnau hin ngaipeh-in lang athusei dihnau chu hinkhoh sah tei teiyin,

chujongle nangma douna namite chonsetna chu hin ngaidam jengin, nangma douna thil abol khel jouseu abonchan ngaidam tan; amaho soh chang dinga kaimang mite mitmu chang tah chun achunguva lainatna hin neipeh jeng le chun amaho bolsea pang ho jong chun achunguva lainatna aneipeh thei diu ahi,
ijeh-inem itileh amaho hi nangma mite ahiuvin, nangma goulo thillu ahiuve, amaho hi nangin Egypt gama pum mei thih kijap-am lah tobanga nahin puidoh peh ahiuve.
Nasohpa keima taona le namite Israel taona kathil thum uhi hinven lang, ipi pi hijongle keihon nahenga kathum uhi nangin neijah peh tei teiyun.

Ijeh-inem itileh nangman namite hi leiset’a mitin vaipi lah a kona nalhendoh a, Vo Pakai Pathen, nangman kapu kapateu Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh laiya chu nalhachapa Mose jah a nahinseiya amaho hi nangma goulo thillua pang ding ahi, tia naphondohsa ahitai,” ati.
Solomon chun ataona ding jousea ataosoh a athil thum ding jouse athumsoh phat, Pakai henga agotchan asei chaisoh phat’in adilsuh a van lam sanga atouna Pakai maicham maiya kon chun ahung dingdoh tai;
chuin Solomon chu ading denin Israel khoppi pumpi chu phatthei aboh-in ogin sang tah-in asamin hitin aseiye,

“Athutep bang banga amite Israel kicholdo sah theiya gal sat louva umsah a Pakai chu nun nom hen; Pakaiyin alhachapa Mose kama aseisa athutep thupha tah tah ho chu khat’a khat jeng cha jong athon-ah aumpoi.
Pakai iPathenu chun ipu ipateu aumpi jing bang chun eiho jong eiumpi jingu hen, eiho hi eilha kang da hel-u hen lang donlouvin jong eikoi hih hel leh aphai;

chutihen lang hileh aman ipu ipateu athupehsa ama lamlhah juina thei, athupeh chengse nitna thei, achondan jouse leh achonna dan jouse juina thei lungthim aman einei sah theiyuva ama lam jeng ikat jing thei diu ahi.

Tua keiman Pakai angsunga taona kaneiya thil kathumna kathusei jouse hi asun ajanin Pakai i-Pathenu henga ging jing jeng hen lang, hijeh chun aniseh a kidei khoh thil ho dungjuiyin alhachapa keima le amite Israel ding hinkhoh sah tei tei hen;
chutileh leiset chunga mitin vaipi hin Pakai hi Pathen ahinai, ti ahetdoh thei dingu ahin, pathen adang aumpoi, ti ahetdoh diu ahiye.
Nang ho jong nalungthim pumpiu Pakai i-Pathenu angsunga dih jing jeng hen lang, tulaiya bang bang hin achondan jouse le athupeh chengse nit bukim jing hen,” tin aseitai.
Chutah chun Solomon lengpa leh Israel pumpin Pakai angsunga kilhaina gan athat tauve.

Chamna thilto dingin Solomon in Pakai angsunga bongchal sang som ni le sang ni toh kelngoi sang ja khat le sang som ni jen atoh jenge. Hitobang hin Solomon lengpa leh Israel chate jousen Pakai houin chu athensotauve.

Hiche nikho ma ma chun Solomon lengpa’n inpi lhong kimlai Pakai houin mai jong chu athensotai; ijeh-inem itileh aman hikoma hi pumgo thilto atoa, lhosoh thilto jong atodoh a, chamna thilto sathao them them jong atoa asuh theng ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakai angsunga kido sum-eng maicham chu pumgo thilto to-na ding, lhosoh thilto to-na ding, chamna thilto sathao them them todohna din aneo behseh tan ahi.

Hichepet hin Solomon chun golvah kut anabol’in Israel pumpin akikhop piuvin, ni sagi sungin Hamath kotphunga pat Egypt vadung kikah a mihem hung kikhom khoppi nasa tah chu Pakai i-Pathenu angsunga akikhom jing jenguve.

Niget lhin nin Solomon in mipi asol mang tai; amahon jong lengpa Solomon chu phatthei aboh cheh-uvin ama ama inlam cheh akijot’uvin, Pakaiyin alhachapa David ding le Israel dinga thilpha abol chengse chu alungthim uva kipah thanom tah-in agel’uvin ahi.
Solomon chun Pakai houin asah jouva, lengpa in asah jou, chule asah nom in jouse asah jousoh hel phat’in
Pakai chu anivei nan Solomon henga ahung kilah kit’in, Gibeon khoa ahung kilah bang bangin ahenga ahung kilah-e.

Hichun Pakaiyin Solomon jah a aseiyin ahi, “Keiman kamasanga nangma taona le nathil thum chu kajatai: hijeh chun hiche houin nasah doh jong hi kathenson, aitih chan geiya um jing jeng din ka minjong hikoma hin kapansah tai; kamit tenin vejing ing ting, kalungthima kagel jing jeng ding ahi.

Nangma vang hi keima angsunga nalamlhah jing theiya, napa David bang banga nachon a, lungdet tah le lung dih tah a naum jinga, keiman nang kathupeh chengse nanit jing jeng theiya, keima chonna dan jouse le kachondan jouse nanit soh keiya ahivang leh,

keiman napa David henga kathutep a hitia kaseiya, ‘Israel laltouna natoupeh ding nang dinga mihem khat thon louva hung umdoh tei tei ding ahi,’ tia kaseipeh bang banga keiman nalaltouna hi aitih chan geiya dinga jong Israel chunga um jing dia nangma kaphudet ding nahi.

Amavang nangma nahin nachate ahiuvin keima neijui na a kona nakihei manga, keiman namasanga kakoipeh kathupeh chengse leh kachonna dan jouse hi nanit louva, nache manga pathen chom chom nahou uva chibai naboh-uva ahileh,

keiman kapehsa hiche gamsunga kona hi Israelte kasuh ihah ding ahi; chujongle keima min kiphah jingna dinga kathensosa hiche houin jong hi kamitmua kapaidoh jeng ding ahi; chutengle Israelte hi mitin vaipi lah a kihilna thuchih le seichah bep’a hung umdoh ding ahiuve.

Chule hiche houin jeng jong hi in-gema kijam ding, mihem ajotpa jousen adat mouva aphiset khum khum diu ahi; chutengle amaho chun hitia asei dingu, ‘Ipi ding pentah a Pakaiyin hiche gamsunga hiche houin hi hitipia hi abol jeng hitam?’ atidiu ahi.

Hichele chun amiho ma man aseiyuva, ‘Ajeh pen tah vang hi, amahon Egypt gamsunga kona apu apateu hinpuidoh pa Pakai a-Pathenu adondauva, pathen lim semthu achom chom akolchah joh-uva, hitobang thil ho chu chibai aboh-uva ahoujeh-u ahiye; hichejeh a chu Pakaiyin achunguva thilse hijatpi hi ahinpoh lut ahitai,’ tia asei dingu ahi,” ati.
Solomon in Pakai houin le lengpa in ding asah jou kal kum som ni kichai nungin,

Tyre lengpa Hiram chun Solomon jong hi akithopia cedar thing le chah thing inthil anapeh a, Solomon chun adeichat jat jat sana geiya anapeh ahin, hijeh chun Solomon lengpa’n jong Hiram lengpa chu Galilee gamsunga khopi som nijen apedoh tan ahi.
Ahivangin Hiram hi Solomon in apehsa khopi som ni ho chu avetoh dinga Tyre gamsunga kona ahunga ahileh akho miten analung lhaisah tapouvin ahi.
Hijeh chun Hiram injong aseitai, “Sopi Solomon, nangin neipeh khopi ho hi itobang khopi hiuva hitam?” tin anaseiyin; hijeh chun tuni geiyin hiche khopi ho hi Cabul gam, tin akiminvo den den tai.
Hiram hin Solomon lengpa din sana talent ja khat le som ni ahinthot’e.

Solomon lengpa’n Pakai houin sahna ding le ama in mong mong sahna ding, Millo sahdoh na ding, Jerusalem pal kaikhumna ding, Hazor khopi le Megiddo khopi chule Gezer khopi sahna dinga kai adonle mi engbola na atohsahna thalut sum lut jat chu hiti hi ahiye;

Pharaoh leng, Egypt lengpa chu anakontouvin Gezer khopi hi anajouvin, meiyin ahalvamin, akhopi sunga chengte canaan miho chu athat gamin, chuin akhopi hi achanu Solomon jinu sumken dingin anakenpeh tai;
hijeh chun Solomon in Gezer jong athahsah kit’in, Beth-hor’on noinungjo jong chu asaphai;
Judah gamsunga Ba’alath khopi le Tamar jong chu gamthip laiya khopi gel ahin Solomon in anasaphan,

Solomon in thil kholna dinga anei khopi chengse jong ahin, sakol kangtalai kholna anei khopi ho ahin, sakol touthem miho chenna khopi chengse ahin, Jerusalem khopia Solomon in asah nom jat jat khopi jong asan, Lebanon gama jong asan, ama lengvaipohna gamsung pumpia asah nom chan asan ahi.
Israel mi hilou Amor mi ahingdoh cheng le Hit mite ahingdoh cheng, Periz mite ahingdoh ho leh Hivi mite ahingdoh cheng, Jebus mite ahingdoh cheng ahiuvin,
Israel chaten asuhmang hel thei louvu hiche mite chilhah miho agamsunga kidalha dense se chu Solomon in engbolna soh natongin agoiyin, tuni geiyin amaho hi hitobang hin aum jinguve.

Israel chate vang chu Solomon in soh natongin agoipoi; amaho chu sepaiyin apanguvin, vaibolin apangun, agal lamkai le sepai loi upan apanguvin, Solomon kangtalai tollah a lamkai le sakol touthem sepai jengin apanguvin ahiye.
Solomon natohna chung changa vaibol pipua pang miho chu hicheng hi ahiuve: natonga pang mihem jouse vetup’a pangjeng jengjong mihem vaibola pang ja nga le som nga alhinguve.
Pharaoh chanu chu David khopia konin achen Solomon in ama dinga asahpeh ainlama chun achetoutai; hichea hi Solomon in Millo khopi hi asahdoh ahi.

Solomon hin kum khat sungin thumvei vei Pakai dinga maicham asem doh chunga chun pumgo thilto jeng jeng leh chamna thilto atohdoh jin, Pakai angsunga gimnamtui ahal namjie; hitobanga hi Solomon chun houin anasah jou ahitai.
Solomon lengpa’n Edom gamsunga Eloth kiti koma twikhanglensan panga chun E’zion’ge’ber muna kong innei jeng jeng sepai hon jamah khat dingin anasemin ahi.
Hiram injong hiche Solomon kong inneiya sepai hon jamah chutoh ama sepaite le twikhanglena kithem chuhsa twithem sepaite toh Solomon sepaite chutoh akilhonsah-in asol thatai.
Amaho chu acheuvin Ophir geiyin akitol’uve; chuin Ophir’a konin sana ahintol kit’uvin, sana jat chu talent ja li le som ni alhinge; amahon hiche hi Solomon lengpa henga ahinchoi lut’uvin ahi.
Pakai min jal a Solomon min than thudol ajah doh phat’in Sheba lengnu chu ahungin Solomon chu thudoh hahsa sa doh a patep dingin ahung goi.

Sheba lengnu chu minthang tah-in Jerusalema ahungin, gimnamtui tamtah le sana tamtah jong chule song mantam tamtah jong sangongsaote ahinpoh sah-in ahunge; Solomon heng ahung lhun phat’in Sheba lengnu’n alungthim gila agel jouse aseipeh soh keitan ahi.
Hichea hin Solomon chun amanu thudoh tapou abonchan adonbut thei soh keiye; adoh tapou chu Solomon lengpa’n aseipeh thei lou akisela aum hih hel’e.
Sheba lengnu chun Solomon chihna aboncha amudoh soh keiya chule houin asah doh chu amuphat’in,

a-ankong phunga kilui anneh kibol avet’a, avaibola pang mite avetsoh keiya, alhachalea pang asohte amua, aponsil akivon nau avet’a, akhon doma pang ho amudoh a, Pakai houin sunga Solomon in pumgo thilto gantha abolji ho chu amusoh hel phat’in Sheba lengnu chu salhamin athat hel jengin ahi.
Sheba lengnu’n Solomon lengpajah a aseiyin, “Kagamsunga kona kahinjah thu kisei nachung chang thudol leh nachihna kisei chu adih mong mong tai,

ahin athudol kisei chu kahunga kamit te mong monga kahung mudoh masangsen keiman kanatahsan naisai poi; ahinla vetan, ahung kisei thu kithang chun akeh khat jeng jong aseidoh lou lai ahibouve; keiman kajah dol chu nachihna le nahaona hin akhokheljo mong mong tan ahi.
Najite la anun nom ahiuvin! Nangma angsunga dingjing jenga nachihna thusei ngai jing theiya hiche nalhacha ho jong hi anun nom ahiuve!

Nachunga kipana neiya Israel laltouna natousah Pakai na-Pathen chu nun nom hen! Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin Israel alungset jal’in thu adih lam le akitah lama tan peh thei ding nangma hi lengvai napohsah tai,” ati.

Chujouvin Sheba lengnu’n Solomon lengpa chu sana talent ja khat le som ni toh, gimnamtui tamtah le song mantam tamtah apetai; Sheba lengnu’n hichea Solomon lengpa apeh tobanga tam hiche gimnamtui apeh jat hi koiman ahung pekit tapoi.
Ahin Hiram lengpa kong inneiya sepai hon tamtah ho, Ophir gama sana polea pang ho vang chun Ophir’a konin almug thing tamtah leh song mantam tamtah ahinpolut nauve.

Solomon lengpa’n hiche almug thing ho chu Pakai houin douna le lengpa in dounan amangin, lathem ho dingin semjang saithei leh selangdah din jong asempeh nai; hitobang thing hi ahung kipolut kit tapon, tuni geiyin mujong akimu kit tapoi.

Solomon lengpa’n Sheba lengnu adeichan apen, Solomon lengpa’n peh dia akitepna kalvalin jong ipi hijongle amanu’n athum chan ape jenge; chujouvin Sheba lengnu jong akiheiyin asohte akipuiyin ama gam langa achetai.
Solomon haodan chu ahileh: kum khat sunga Solomon henga hung lut mong mong sana chu akitetoh a ahitengleh agihdan sana talent jagup le somgup le gup alhingjie;

hiche hi kivei mitea kona kila leh lamlhah khomol dunga kivei mihoa kona kila jong, Arabia gamsunga lengte henga kidong doh ho ahin, chule gamsung vaipo hoa kona kidong doh ho jong kisimtha loulai ahibouve.
Solomon lengpa’n sana jeng jengin akhengin ompho len tah tah ompho ja ni jen aseme; ompho khat semna ahin sana shekel jagup cheh alut’in ahi.
Sana a kikheng jeng ompho jathum jen jong asemin, ompho khat cheh a hin sana mina thum thum alut’in, hiche ompho chengse hi Solomon lengpa’n Lebanon gammang insunga akoisoh keiye.
Solomon lengpa’n laltouna lentah khat jong hi saihan asemin ahi; hiche saiha a kisem laltouna chu sana hoitah tah-in aloijol sel kit nalaiye.

Laltouna hi kaltouna ding kalbi gup kikhap tou ahin, laltouna anung lama chu bongnou luchang lim khat akisemin ahi, touna jet le veiya chun ban ngapna aum cheh-in, chule ban ngapna teni pang cheh a hin sakei bahkai lim khat khat cheh akiseme;
chujongte kalbi gup chu khat khat mong alang langa sakei bahkai khat cheh akisemin, abonchan sakei bahkai som le ni lim akiseme; hitobang hin midang koima cha lenggam sunga laltouna akisemlul khapoi.

Solomon lengpa lengpitwi donna khon jouse jong abonchan sana jeng jenga kisem ahin, chule Lebanon gammang insunga kimang kong le bel jouse jong chu sana thengsel cheh ahisoh keiye; khat’a khat jeng cha jong dangkan akisempoi, ijeh-inem itileh Solomon khang laiyin dangka chu imachan akigelpon ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Solomon lengpa’n Tarshish gama kisem kong innei tampi jong aneiya sepai hon tamtah pi twikhanglena apansah ahin, Hiram lengpa kong innei sepaite chutoh pangkhom ahiuve; hichea hi kum thum alhinseh leh Tarshish kong innei ho hin sana le dangka toh saiha le gulduvun chule va-hongte ahinpoh ji jiu ahi.
Hitobang hin Solomon lengpa hin haona le chihnan leiset leng dang jouse akhelsoh hel in ahi.
Hijeh chun Pathen in Solomon lungthima akoipeh chihna thusim ngai dingin leiset miten abonchauvin Solomon heng ahinhol hol jenguvin ahi.

Mi ahung jousen Solomon peh ding thilpeh ahinpo cheh-uvin, dangka le sana jong, ponsil ding jong, gal manchah ho jong, gimnamtui ho ahin, sakol ho ahin, sakolpol ho jeng jong, ajat simjou louhel khop’in kumsim seh leh ahinpo po jenguve.

Solomon in kangtalai jouse leh sakol touthem jouse akoukhomsoh keiyin, hichea hin kangtalai sang khat le ja li aneiyin, sakol touthem sepai sang som ni jen aneiye; sepaite le kangtalai hijatpi hi Solomon in kangtalai kikholna khopi dung le Jerusalema chun lengpa umna a akoiyin ahi.
Solomon lengpa’n Jerusalem khopi sunga hin dangka song chang jat aphah sah jengin, cedar thing jeng jong Shephe’lah gamsunga theipi thing jat aphah sah jenge.
Solomon lengpa’n sakol achohna gam chu Egypt le Ku’e gam ahin, lengpa dinga thilchoa pang mihon Ku’e kiti muna hi aman apeh-uva agachoh jiu ahi;

Egypt gama konin kangtalai khat chu dangka shekel jagup manin akicho jouvin, sakol khat chu dangka shekel ja khat le som ngan akicho jouve; hitobang hin lengpa’n ama dia thiljoh le thilchoa pang hoa konin athilchoh chengseu chu Hit mite leng ho leh Syria gama leng ho henga ajoh son sah kit jin ahi.
Solomon lengpa hin gamdang numei tampi adei chatan, Pharaoh chanu keo jeng ahitapoi; Moab numei ahin, Ammon numei ahin, Edom numei ahin, Sidon numei ahin, chule Hit mite numei ahin,

namtin vaipi chujat chung chang thudola Pakaiyin Israel chate anapho masah a hitia aseiya, “Hiche nam mite hitoh nang ho nakichen thei louhel diu, amaho jong nang ho toh kicheng thei lou diu ahi, achutilouva ahileh amaho hin nalungthim jouseu nahei lhah peh gam’uva amaho pathen lim semthu ho jeng nahousah dingu ahi,” tia anaseisa hiche namtin jousea kon hin numei jin akipuiyin, Solomon in amaho hi adeichan akolchah soh tai.
Hiti hin Solomon chun leng chanu jeng ji numei ja sagi jen aneiyin, thaikem jong jathum aneiye; hijeh chun ajite hon alungthim aheilha soh tauvin ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Solomon chu ahung tehset phat’in ajiten alungthim aheimang tauvin, pathen lim semthu achom chom ahousah tauve; akhon khon nan ama hi apa David lungput bangin Pakai a-Pathen henga alungthim apumpin apen achon bukimsoh jou tapoi.
Ajeh chu Solomon hin Sidon miten ahouvu pathen nu atiu Ash’toreth jong ahouvin, Ammon mite hou thet umtah Milcom kiti jong chu ahoutai.
Hiti hin Solomon chun Pakai mitmun thilse aboltan, apa David bangin alung thim pumpin Pakai nung ajuiyin achon bukim thei tapoi.

Chujouvin jong Solomon chun Moab mite hou thet umtah Chemosh kiti doi houna dingin doiphung asempeh in, Ammon mite hou thet umtah Molech doi houna din jong doiphung asemin, Jerusalem kom niso lama molsang chunga hiche doiphung ho hi asemdoh tai.
Hitobang hin Solomon in gamchoma akipui ajite din gin doiphung asempeh soh keiyin, ajiten jong hiche ahouvu doilim kisemthu ho koma hin kilhaina gimnamtui ahal haljiuve.
Hichejeh chun Solomon chunga Pakai alung hangin, ama henga jong nivei jen hung kilahsa Pakai Israel Pathen henga kona alungthim ahei mang hel jeh hin alung hang mong mong tai;
ajeh chu Pakaiyin ama thu apeh a hiche ho chung chang thudola hi Pathen kihisah a doilim kisemthu ho hi ahou louhel ding ati, ahin, ahivangin Solomon in hiche Pakai thupeh hi ananit tapoi.

Hichejeh hin Pakaiyin Solomon jah a aseiyin, “Nangman nalungthim sunga hitobang hi navop’a chule keiman nang kathupehsa keima kitepna le kachonna dan jouse nanit loujeh hin keiman nalenggam hi kalhekhen hel a nalhachapa khat kapeh ding ahi.
Hijongle napa David khohsah jeh a nangma thi masangsea vang kabol pai lou ding, nachapa khut’a kona vang kalhekhen ding ahitai.
Hichea hi nalenggam pumpi vang kalhe lhah lou ding ahi; kalhachapa David gel khohna jal leh keiman kalhentum Jerusalem khopi vanga nachapa chu Israel phung khat vang kapeh nah nah ding ahi,” ati.
Chujouvin Pakaiyin Solomon dou dingin Edom mi Hadad kitipa chu ahintildoh tan ahi; hichepa hi Edom lengte insung peng mong mong ahiye.
Ajeh chu Edom gama David anapansat lai chun sepai lamkaiya pang Jo’ab kitipa chu mithi vui dinga achetouna a Edom gamsunga pasal jouse anathat gamhel’in ahi;
ijeh-inem itileh Edom gama Jo’ab chun pasal jouse athagam hel kahsea Jo’ab le Israel pumpi chu lha gup sunga gatham den jeng ahiuve.
Hiche laiya hi Hadad kitipa chu anajamdoh a Egypt gama jamlut’a, apa sohte Edom mi phabep toh anakilhon ahiuvin, Hadad vang chu chapang neochabou anahi nalaiye.

Ajam laiyuvin amaho hi Midian gama konin Paran gama ahung kitol lut’uvin, Paran gama konin mi phabep akipuiyun Egypt gama Egypt lengpa Pharaoh henga ahung tauve; Egypt lengpa Pharaoh chun Hadad hi in khat apen, neh le chah mohseh-in apen, chenna ding gam jong apen ahi.
Chuin Hadad kitipa hi Pharaoh mitmua lungdei dei uma achonjeh-in Pharaoh jong chun ama jinu Tah’penes lengnu sopinu Hadad ji din apen akichensah tai.

Tah’penes lengnu sopinu chun Hadad chutoh chapa khat ahing lhonin, amin Genu-bath akitin, Tah’penes in ama chu Pharaoh insung mong monga anavah jin, hijeh chun Genu’bath hi Pharaoh insunga achengin Pharaoh chapate lah a alhalei.

Hadad hin Egypt gamsunga konin David jong athitan apu apate toh akijam khomin, sepaite lamkaipa Jo’ab jong athitai, ti ajah doh phat’in Hadad chun Pharaoh lengpa jah a aseiyin, “Kagamsunga kachelut theina dingin neisol tan,” tin athume.
Ahivangin Pharaoh chun ajah a aseiyin, “Nangman kei koma ipi lhahsamna naneiya tutah a nagamsunga che ding nasom ham?” tia adoh leh; aman jong adonbut’in, “Neisol pou pouvjn,” atitai.
Solomon dou dingm Pathenin Eli’ada chapa Rezon kitipa jong chu atildoh kit’in ahi, ama hi apupa Zobah lengpa Hadad-e’zer koma kona ana jamdohsa ahiye.

Rezon kitipa hin akoma mi akhom khomin, David in mi atha nung chun Rezon hi michom gama pang miho lamkaiyin akisemdoh paiyin, hiche tobang miho hi acheuvin Damascus khoa agacheng uvin Rezon hi leng din apansah tauve.

Solomon nikho laiyin Rezon hi Israelte kidoupi gunset’in anapangin ahi, chujongle Hadad bol bang bangin thil duh dah lou jengpi anabol jin ahi; Israelte hi ahot behseh jeh-in ama hi Syria gamsunga lengin a pang dentan ahi.
Nebat chapa Jerobo’am kitipa, Zeredah khoa cheng Ephraim mi khat, Solomon dinga lhacha ho lah a mi khat jong chu meithainu Zeru’ah kitinu chapa ahin, ama jong hin Solomon lengpa dounan khut alamtai.
Jerobo’am kitipan Solomon lengpa adouna ajeh chu hiti hi ahiye: Solomon hin Millo khopi asaphan, apa David khopi sang avang lai athoi bing tai.

Jerobo’am kitipa hi thil bolthei tah mihem khat anahin, Solomon jong chun hiche gollhangpa hi natong them thilbol thei tah ahi, ti amudoh phat’in Joseph insung mite engbolna natohna chunga avaibol le athu nei dingin apansah tai.

Hitobanga natonga apan lai hin Jerobo’am jong Jerusalema kona apotdoh a ahileh Shiloh khoa kona hung Ahijah themgaopan lampia akitopin ahi. Hichea hi Ahijah themgaopa chun ponthah abangleh khat ahinsil ahi; amani chu achangseh lhona gamlah a kitoh kha ahilhone.
Hichun Ahijah themgaopan akisil janglai ponthah pet chu akhut tenin atuh chah jengin abottel tel jengin keh som le keh ni jenin abot keh tai.
