Chujongle Ahijah chun Jerobo’am jah a aseiyin, “Hiche ponhal som hi nangman kilah tan; ijeh-inem itileh Pakai Israel Pathen chun hitin aseiye, ‘Vetan, keiman Solomon khut’a kona lenggam hi kalhetel ding koncha ahitai, hichea hi keiman Jerobo’am nangma hi Israel phung som kapeh ding nahi,
ahin Solomon hi kalhachapa David jal leh keiman Israel phung hijat lah a kalhendohsa Jerusalem khopi jeh a Israel phung khatseh bou chang ding ahi;

ajeh chu Solomon in keima donlouvin eikoitan, Sidon mite doi lim semthu apathennu atiu Ash’toreth joh ahouvin, Moah mite doi lim semthu Chemosh ahouvin, Ammon mite doilim semthu Milcom jong ahouvin, keima lamlhah jouse ajui tapouvin, keima mitmua adih bol louvin aumin, apa David umchan bangin aumpon, keima chonna dan jouse le kachondan jouse jong anit tapoi.

Hitajongleh keiman ama khut’a konin jong lenggam pumpi ladoh samponge; keima thupeh jouse le kachonna dan jouse nit bukim keiya kalhensa kalhachapa David jal a keiman Solomon jong ahin laisea vaihoma kapansah jing ding ahinai;
ahivangin lenggam hi achapa khut’a konjoh a kalahdoh a, Jerobo’am nangma hi Israel phung som khat kapeh ding nahi.

Solomon chapa vang chu keiman kalhendohsa Jerusalem khopi kamin kiphahna ding kati laiya hi kei angsunga kalhachapa David chun thaomei vah banga vah ding leng khat anei jing theina dinga Israel phung khat vang kapeh ding ahi.
Chuti chun ken nangma napuiying ting nangman nadei jat jat chunga lengvai napoh a, Israel chunga leng nachan ding ahi.

Nangin keima sei sei na ngaiya, kathupeh jouse nanit’a, kamit mua adih dih nabola, kalhachapa David banga chu kachonna jouse nanit a kathupeh chengse nanit bukima ahileh, keiman napanpi jing ing ting, David dinga kabolpeh bang banga indet khat kasahpeh ding nahin, Israelte hi nangma kapeh ding nahi.
Hichea hi keiman David chilhahte hi kasuh nem diu ahin, amavang aitih chan geiya hitia hi kaboldeh lou ding ahiuve,’ tin aseiye,” ahung ti.

Hichejeh hin Solomon chun Jerobo’am chu tha din aholtai; ahinla Jerobo’am chu akipatdoh pai paiyin Egypt gama ajamlut’in, Egypt lengpa Shishak kitipa agabel’in, Solomon thikah sen Egypt gamsunga agatham dentan ahi.
Solomon thilbol anatoh adang dang atohdoh jouse leh achihna geiya aboncha Solomon thilbol kisutna lekhabua kijih lut soh kei hilou ham?
Solomon in Jerusalem khopia Israelte chunga lengvai apohna chu aphat kum som li alhingin ahi.
Chuin Solomon jong athitan, apu apate toh akijam khomin, apa David khopia avuivuyin, ama khel din achapa Rehobo’am kitipa chun lengvai apotai.
Rehobo’am chu Shechema achetai, ijeh-inem itileh Israel pumpi chu ama leng chansah dinga Shechema hung kikhom ahitauve.

Hiche thudol hi Nebat chapa Jerobo’am chun ajatai; hiche laiya jong hi Jerobo’am chu Solomon ginna ajamdoh a Egypt gamsunga achemang chu umden jing jeng nalai ahin, chuphat’in Jerobo’am jong Egypt gama konin ahung kilepai pai tan ahi.
Chuin mihon jong Jerobo’am kou din mi asol’uvin, hijeh chun Jerobo’am le Israel khoppi pumpi chu ahunguvin Rehobo’am jah a ahung seitauve,

“Napan keiho dingin pohgih hahsa jeng anabolin, hijeh chun tubeh-in nangman napa thilgon natoh hahsa le pohgih chujatpi chu semjang domin hin, achutileh keihon nangma na tong nau vinge,” ahung tiuvin ahi.
Rehobo’am chun amaho jah a aseiyin, “Potdoh uvin lang nithum jou tengle kahenga hung kit tauvin,” atin ahileh; mipi jong alampi cheh a akichesoh tauve.

Rehobo’am lengpa’n jong apa Solomon hin laiya akoma lhacha le natonga ding jing upa chengse chu akou khomin akihoulim pin hitin aseiye, “Hiche mipiho hi keiman iti kadonbut ding ham, kadonbut theina din nang hon iti kihil leh neitiu vam?” ati.

Hichun upahon jong ajah a aseiyuvin, “Tunia nangma hiche mite dinga hi lhacha napan ding mong mong ahileh amaho kinbol din pang inge, tia nagel leh amaho khu nadonbut tengleh phate ten houvin, chutileh amaho khu aitih geiya nangma lhacha pang jeng diu ahi,” atipeh-uve.
Ahivangin Rehobo’am chun upaten ahilnau chu adondan, ama gol le pai ahung seilet thapi ho, ama angsunga lhacha adinsah jing ho joh chu adongin akihil sah jon ahi.
Hiche khangdong ho jah a chun Rehobo’am chun aseiyin, “Hiche mite keima jah a, ‘Napan keiho eipoh sah-u pohgih hi jangkhai domin semin,’ tia hung seiho hi iti donbut leu hen, tia nagelu ham?” atileh;

amatoh hung seilet tha gollhang loi chun aseiyuvin ajah a, “Nangma henga hunga najah a, ‘Napan keiho toh ding pohgih hahsa anasem’in, ahin nangman jangkhai domin neisempeh-uvin,’ tia seiho chu nangman hitia hi nadonbut a chule ajah uva hitia hi naseipeh ding , ahi, ‘Keima khutjung kamecha hi kapa taibuh teni sanga jong sajo lenjo nalai ahi.

Hijeh a chu tua jong kapan nachunguva pohgih hahsa akoina chan a keiman kapehbe kit nah lai ding nahiuve; kapan nathemmo tengu leh khaojang mai maiya najep jiu ahin, ken vang thihjola kajep diu nahi,’ tin seipeh jon,” atiuve.
Jerobo’am le mipi chu abonchauva Rehobo’am henga ahung uvin, lengpa’n athupeh bang banguvin nithum lhin nin, “Nithum lhin ni leh kahenga hunguvin,” tia aseipeh bangin ahungtauve.
Hichun lengpa’n mipi chu o-ngeimo tah-in anadonbut jeng tan, upaten ahilguh nau chu khat cha jong alapoi;

gollhang hon ahilnau bang joh chun anadonbut jengin, hitin aseiye, “Kapan nang ho toh ding pohgih hahsa anasem ahin, ahinla keiman kagonpeh be kit nah lai diu ahi; kapan nangho nathemmo tenguleh khaojang mai maiya najep jiu ahin, kenvang thihjola bou kajep ding nahiuve,” atitai.

Hiti hin lengpa’n mipi thu alahpeh tapoi. Ijeh-inem itileh hiche thilsoh hi Pakaiyin Nebat chapa Jerobo’am henga Shiloh mi themgaopa Ahijah anaseisah thilsoh ding chu athusei banga aguilhun theina Pakai gontoh le thil ahitai.

@@Israel mipin abonchauva lengpa umchan athuseiyu ngaisah a aneipeh louvu chu amudoh phat’uvin, mipin lengpa chu adonbut’uvin hitin aseiyuve: “David vaipohna a chu keihon ipi chan kaneiyum? Jesse chapa vaipohna a goulo ding kanei pouve. Vo Israel, naponbuh cheh kijot tauvin! Tun David’in jong na-insung bou kivet tan,” atiuve. Hiti hin Israelte chu ama ama ponbuh ainlam cheh a akiche soh keitauve.
Ahivangin Rehobo’am chu Judah gamsunga khopi dunga cheng Israel chate chung seh seh a alengvaipoi.

Chuin Rehobo’am lengpa’n engbolna natong ho chunga vaipoa pang pa Ador’am kitipa chu asoldoh-in tohvai boi dia asolleh Israel pumpin amapa chu songin anasep lih del jeng tauve. Rehobo’am lengpa jeng jong chu kin le bongin kangtalai chunga atoudoh-in Jerusalema ahung jamlut loi jeng tan ahi.
Hijeh chun tuni geiyin Israel miten David insung mite adoulo tauvin ahi.

Israel pumpin Jerobo’am Egypt gama konin ahung kile kit tai, ti thu ajah doh phat’uvin mi asol’un khoppilen kikhopna a akoulut sah-uvin Israelte chunga lengin apansah tauve. David insung mite nung juiya koima aumtapon, Judah phung seh seh bou ahitai.

Rehobo’am chu Jerusalem ahung lhun phat’in Judah insung kon mite leh Benjamin phunga mite chu abonchan akhomsoh keiyin ahileh, galbol them lhentum sepai sangja khat le sang somget alhinguvin, amaho chu Israel insung mite toh kisat’a, Solomon chapa Rehobo’am lenggam semphat peh dingin akigotauve.
Ahivangin Pathen mi Shemai’ah kitipa henga chun Pathenin thu ahinseitan,
“Solomon chapa, Judah lengpa Rehobo’am le Judah insung kon mite ahiuvin, Benjamin insung kon mite ahiuvin chule mipi amoh cheng adang dang jah a seipeh-in lang hin,

’Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: Nang ho nakontou uva najat chanpiu Israel chate khu nakisatpi lou diu ahi. Amitakip ama ama inlam cheh a kile kit jenguvin, ajeh chu hiche thu kisei hi keiya hung kon ahin, kei phatsah joh ahibouve,’ ati, gatin,” ti. Hijeh chun amahon jong Pakai thusei angai khen jenguvin, Pakai thusei kisei bang bangin inlama ache kit tauve.
Jerobo’am kitipan Ephraim thinglhang gamsunga Shechem khopi akisahin hikoma chun acheng tai; hichea kon hin apotdoh kit’in Penu’el khopi asakit nalaiye.
Jerobo’amin alungthim sunga agelin hitin aseiye, “Tua hi lenggam pumpi hi David insung mite henga kile kit tei tei ding ahitai;

hiche mipiho hi Jerusalem khopia Pakai houin jona acheuva kilhaina gantha bol dinga achetou jing jenguva ahileh, mipi hi alungthimu aboncha apu u Rehobo’am, Judah lengpa lama kiheisoh hel’a, keima eimoh thauva chutengleh Judah lengpa Rehobo’am henga kiheisoh hel diu ahitai,” ati.

Hijeh chun Jerobo’am lengpa’n mi adong toh len, sana alan bongnou lim ni jen asemin, chuin mipi jah a chun aseitai, “Jerusalem lama nachetou tou jeng nau hi asot lheh jeng tan ahi. Vetan vo Israel, Egypt gamsunga kona nahin puidoh pau na-pathenu chu hiche teni ahibouve,” ati.
Hiti hin bongnou lim khat chu Bethel khopia atungin, chule achom khat joh jong chu Dan khopia atung tai.
Hiche athilbol hi chonsetna ahidoh lo tan ahi; ajeh chu mipi abang hiche bongnou lim kisemthu koma dingin Bethela acheuvin, adang dang ho ma Dan khopia bongnou lim kisemthu koma dingin achetauve.
Jerobo’am hin khomol dung tin a doiphung asemdoh doh jengin, Levi insung kon mi hilouho jong chu thempun apansah sah jeng tai.

Chuin Jerobo’am hin Judah gamsunga kut kibol bang bangin kum sunga lhaget lhin nan nisom le ni nga lhin ni din kut khat jong apandoh kit’in, hiche nikho teng hileh maicham phunga kilhaina gantha abol boljin ahi; hitobang hin Bethela jong abol jin, aman asemthu bongnou teni hou nan aboljie. Jerobo’am in khomol dunga thempu dinga apansah ho jong chu Bethel khopia jong apansah-e.

Jerobo’am hin alungthim suhto thua aphatsah bangin lhaget lhin ni, nisom le ni nga lhin ni chuleh Bethel khopia maicham asemna a chun achetou jin, Israel chate dingin kut khat abolpeh jin, gimnamtui halnam dingin maicham phunga achetou jin ahi.
Vetan, Pakai thusah a konin Judah gamsunga konin Pathen mi khat ahungin Bethela ahung lhung tai. Hiche pet hin Jerobo’am jong gimnamtui halnam dingin maicham phunga anadingin ahi.

Hichun Pathen mipa chu Pakai thusah dungjuiyin maicham dou nan ahung pengjah jengin aseitai, “Vo maicham, vo maicham, Pakaiyin hitin aseiye: ‘Vetan, David insunga konin chapa khat hung peng intin, ama chu amin Josi’ah kiti ding ahi; Josi’ah hin tua nangma chunga gimnamtui halnama pangji thempuho hi nangma chunga kilhaina gantha banga ahintha ding, nachunga hi mihem gu le chang hung kilhutvam ding ahi,’ tin aseiye,” ahung ti.

Hiche nikho hin aman melchihna khat apen hitin aseiye, “Pakaiyin aseisa melchihna ding chu hiche hi ahi: ‘Vetan, maicham hi hung kiphelhan tin, achunga vutvam jouse jong khu tola kisung lha ding ahi,’ tin aseiye,” atin ahi.

Jerobo’am lengpa’n Pathen mipa thusei chengse chu ajah phat’in, maicham douna athusei apenjah jeng jong chu ajan, Bethel khopia maicham douna athusei jouse jong ajan, hijeh chun Jerobo’am hin maicham phunga kon hin akhut ahinjah khum jengin aseitai, “Hichepa hi man’uvin,” tia asap jah jenga ahileh; hiche mipa douna akhut alap jeng chu akhut akangden jengin, akhut chu atumkit thei tapoi.
Maicham jong chu achimlha jengin, maicham chunga konin vutvam jouse jong akibung lhan, Pakai thupeh dungjui bang tah a Pathen mipan melchihna avetsah bang bangin aumtan ahi.

Chuphat in Jerobo’am lengpa’n Pathen mipa jah a chun aseiyin, “Kakhut hi adam kit theina dingin neitaopeh-in lang, tun Pakai na-Pathen henga alung lhaina dingin neitaopeh loiyin,” tin angeh tai. Hijeh chun Pathen mipan jong Pakai taona aneiyin ahileh Jerobo’am lengpa khut chu adamtan, masanga bang bangin aumdoh kit tai.
Hichun lengpa’n jong Pathen mipajah a chun aseiyin, “Hungin keito kilhonin inlama che hitin anjong hung nen, keiman nathilpha bolman napenge,” atin ahi.
Ahivangin Pathen mipan lengpa chu adonbut’in aseitai, “Na-in khu akeh khat hel neipeh ding hijongle nangto vang kilhon lut ponge. Nangma inmun mong monga khun anjong nepong ting twi jong don ponge;

ijeh-inem itileh Pakai thusei chun hitin keima thu eipen aseitai, ‘Nangman anjong naneh lou ding twi jong nadon louhel ding, najotpa lampi jong nahin nungjui kit louhel ding ahi,’ tin aselbouve,” ati.
Hiti hin Pathen mipa chu Bethel ahinjotna lampia chu hung kile kit louvin lampi chom dang khat’ a achejo tan ahi.

Hiche lai hin Bethel khopia hin themgao tehsepu khat anachengin, hiche themgaopa chapate chu apau henga ahunguvin Pathen mipan hiche nikhoa Bethela anatoh athilbol abonchan ahung seitauve; Pathen mipan lengpa henga asei athusei jouse jong chu themgaopu chapaten apau jah a aseisoh keiyuvin ahi.
Hichun apauvin amaho jah a aseiyin, “Hiche Pathen mipa chu hoiche lampi pen a che mang hitam?” atileh; achapate chun Judah gama kona hung Pathen mipa che-na lampi chu avetsah-uvin ahiltauve.

Hichun themgaopan jong achapate jah a asei loiyin, “Sangan khat khu katouna ding touna neigado peh loiyun,” atileh: ama honjong sangan khat chu atouna dingin toumun agadopeh loiyun, ama jong achunga atoudoh tan ahi.

Hicliea chun themgaopa jong chu Pathen mipa nung nunga achen ahileh gangpi thing phung noi khat’a anatoupet agalap den tai. Themgaopan Pathen mipa jah a aseiyin, “Judah gama kona hung Pathen mipa chu nang hi nahim ong?” tia adoh a ahileh; aman jong adonbut’in, “Kahi nai,” ati.
Hichun themgaopan jong akouvin, “Keito inlama che hitin, anjong hung nen,” ati.

Ahivangin Pathen mipa chun aseiyin, “Kei nangto kilhon thei pong ting, nangto jong na-insunga lut thei ponge; hiche muna khun nangto anjong nekhom thei pong ting, twijong kadon khompi thei louhel ding nahibouve;

ijeh-inem itileh kahenga hung kithang lut Pakai thusei chun kajah a hitin aseiye, ‘Nangman hikoma khu anjong naneh thei lou ding twijong nadon thei louhel ding ahi, chujongle nahungna lampia jong nakilekit thei louhel ding ahi,’ tin aseibouve,” ati.

Hichun themgaopa jong chun ajah-a aseiyin “Keijong nang banga themgao khat kahin, Pakai thusah a konin vantil’in kajah a thu aseiyin hitin ati, Pathen mipa khun an aneh a twi adon theina dingin nangma insunga hin puilut kit’in,’ tin aseiye,” ati. Ahinla hichea hi themgao tehsepu chun Pathen mipa henga ajou anasei ahi.
Ahin Pathen mipa chu themgaopa chutoh akinung lhonin, ainsunga chun an aganen twi jong agadontan ahi.
Hitia hi amani ankong phunga atoupet tah lhonin Pathem mipa hin nung puiya themgao henga chun Pakaiyin thu ahinseiyin,

hijeh chun amapa jong apeng jah jengin Judah gama kona hung Pathen mipa jah a chun aseitai, “Pakaiyin hitin thu aseiye, ‘Nangman Pakai thusei nit louva, Pakai na-Pathenin nangma nathupeh athupeh nanit louva,

hitia kinung le kit’a, Pakaiyin, “Anjong ne hih-in twijong don hih-in,” tia aseisa hiche lai mun a hi an naneh a twi nadontah jeh hin nangma tahsa nalong hi napu napate lhan khuh a kivui theiya hung vah lut louhel ding ahi’ tin aseiye,” atitai.
Chuin aman jong an aneh jouva twi adon jou phat chun aganung puilut kitpa themgaopa touna dingin sangan chunga toumun asempeh pai paiyin ahi.

Amajong ache mang mang chun lampia sakei bahkai khat hin analamtin tan athat tai. Chuin athilong atahsa chu lamlen laitah a akijamden tan, along koma chun sangan chu adingin, sakei bahkai jong chu along koma chun adingin ahi.

Hichun vetan, mihon ahinjot pauva ahileh lamlen laitah a along akise-lhah a akijam amu uvin, along koma sakei bahkai adin jong amu uve; miho chu ahunguvin themgao tehsepu chenna khopi sunga ajah a ahung seipeh tauve.

Lamkim a kona ama ganung puipa themgao tehsepun athu kisei thang hi ajah doh phat’in aseitan ahi, “Hichepa chu Pakai thusei nit lou Pathen mipa chu ahiye; thu anit loujeh a Pakaiyin ama chu sakei bahkai koma ahoilut a sakei bahkaiyin ama chu atha a abolel jenga, Pakai thusei banga abola, ajah a Pakaiyin aseipeh bang banga abol ahitai,” atin ahi.
Chujongle amapan achapate jah a aseiyin, “Kei touna dingin sangan chunga toumun gasem temun,” atia ahileh; ama honjong hiti chun sangan chunga toumun asempeh tauve.

Themgao tehsepu jong chu achea ahileh lamlen laiya Pathen mipa tahsa athilong akijam agamun, along koma chun sangan le sakei bahkai anadin lhon agamui. Sakei bahkai chun sangan jong athat deh pon, Pathen mipa tahsa jong anedeh poi.
Chuphat’in themgaopan Pathen mipa tahsa chu agadom doh-in sangan chunga ahinpon, along chu khopi sunga chom khat op’a chule vuidoh dingin ahinpo lut’in ahinnung lhut kit tai.
Chuin Pathen mipa thilong chu ama lhankhuh mong monga avuiyin, chujongle apul adouvun, along chunga akap’uvin hitin aseiyuve, “Ohe, sopi kalaijon!” atiuvin ahi.

Themgaopan Pathen mipa hi avuidoh phat’in achapate jah a aseiyin, “Keijong kathi tengleh hiche Pathen mipa kivuina lhankhuh a khun neihin vuitauvin, keima gu le chang abonchan amapa gu le chang koma khun hinkoi tauvin.
Ijeh-inem itileh aman Bethel khopia maicham phung douna le Samaria khopia khomol dung douna Pakai thusei aseidoh a a-eojah jengna thusei chu hung guilhung tei tei ding ahibouve,” ati.

Hiche thilsoh kichai gei hin jong Jerobo’am kitipa hi athilse bolna achonna dung jousea konin jong akihei mangpon, mipi lah a konin khomol dunga thempua pang din mi apansah be be nalaiye; apang nom jouse chu Jerobo’am chun khomol dunga doiphunga thempun apansah pou pou jenge.
Hitobanga athilbol hi Jerobo’am insung mite din chonsetna asohdoh tan, hijeh chun leiset chunga kona Jerobo’am insung chu suh mangna dingin aumdoh khong tan ahi.
Hichelai hin Jerobo’am chapa Abijah kitipa chu adammo tan ahi.

Hijeh chun Jerobo’am hin ajinu jah a aseiyin, “Kipatdoh jengin lang, Jerobo’am jinu nahilam min ahetdoh louhelna dingin kilep’in, limchomin kisemin, Shiloh khopia gachen temin, vele chun hikoma khun Ahijah themgaopa chu achenge; ama khun kei hi hiche mite chunga hi leng nachan ding ahi, tia anaseisa ahi.

Changlhah pheng som kichoiyin, changlhah lhon phabep toh kichoi than, khoiju hai khat toh kidop’in lang, hiche Ahijah themgaopa henga khun gachele chun hiche naosen hi ihungti ding ham, ti aman naseipeh tante,” ati.

Jerobo’am jinun jong hiti chun aboltai; akipat doh pai paiyin Shiloh khopia achen, Ahijah themgaopa insunga chun ahung lut tai. Ahin Ahijah themgaopa chu atehse behseh jeng tan, amit jong athimtan ahileh kichen tah-in amu theitapoi.

Hichun Pakaiyin Ahijah themgaopa jah aseiyin, “Vetan, Jerobo’am jinu khu achapa chung chang thudola adam ding adamlou ding nangma dong din nahenga ahunge; ajeh chu achapa khu anai, nangman hitobang banga hi naseipeh ding ahi,” ati. Jerobo’am jinu chu ahung lhun phat’in numei chomdang khat’in akiseiyin ahi.

Ahivangin Ahijah themgaopan amanu chu kotpi phung ahung sung lhah lhah chun akhoto gin ajan, hijeh chun aseitai, “Hung lut tan, hung lut tan Jerobo’am jinu, ipi dinga numei chomdang khat banga kilep nahim? Ajeh chu nangma seipeh dingin keima thu hahsa tah eikiseipeh tai.
Chen lang Jerobo’am jah a gaseipeh tan, ‘Pakai Israel Pathenin hitin aseiye, “Keiman nang hi mipi lah a kachoisanga, kamite Israel chunga lamkaiya katun nahin,

Lenggam jeng jong hi David insung mitea kona kakeh lhah peh a nangma kapeh nahi; ahinla nangman kalhachapa David bangin thil nabolpon, aman keima thupeh jouse anit’a, alungthim pumpia keima einajui ahin keima mitmua jong adih jeng anabol ahi;

nangman vang nangma masanga mite jouse sangin thilse naboltan, chujongle nache mangin nang din doilim pathen lim nakisem thun, milim kilhajol hou ding nabolin, keima jong neiphin lunghang tan, neijamsan jengin nanung nei ngat del jeng tai.

Hichejeh chun vetan, keiman Jerobo’am insung mite chunga thilse kahin poh lut khum ding, Jerobo’am mite lah a pasala kai kathagama, Israel mite lah a chamlhat hihen lang soh hijongleh, Jerobo’am mi ahi, kiti tapou chu kasuh gamhel ding, min bong-eh gosa alhutvama vutdi asodoh kahsea abolna banga kabol ding ahi.

Jerobo’am insung mia kisei khopi sunga thiden jouse chu uichaten aneh diu ahin, gamlah a thiden ho chu chunga leng vachaten aneh diu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin aseisa ahitai,” tin aseiye’ atin ahi.
Hijeh chun na-inlama chen lang, nakenga khopi sung nachotlut tengleh naosen chu thipai pai ding ahi.

Chutengle Israel pumpin ama pul adou uva, avui diu ahiye; ijeh-inem itileh Jerobo’am insung mite lah a amabou hi lhan a phatea kivuibep ding ahi; ajeh chu Jerobo’am insunga mite lah a ama chunga hin Pakai Israel Pathenin lung lhaina them khat aneiyin ahi.
Hiche kalvala hi Pakaiyin ama dinga Israel chunga leng chang ding mi khat ahintundoh ding ahin, ama hin tulaiya Jerobo’am insung mite hi athagam ding ahitai. Hicheteng hileh

Pakaiyin twilah a peng kiheh bong banga Israel ahinjep lhuh ding, Pakaiyin apu apateu apehna hiche gampha sunga kona hi Israel chu abul abala akaldoh hel a, Euphrates vadung gal lam geiya athecheh soh hel ding ahiuve; ijeh-inem itileh amahon molkhom kithoina abol’uvin Pakai chu aphin lung hang tauve.
Jerobo’amin Israel achonset sah a hibanga achonset lo jeh a hi Pakaiyin Israel hi apaidoh a adonda ding ahitai,” ati.
Jerobo’am jinu chu akipatdoh paiyin apotdoh in Tirzah khopi ahung lhung tan ahi. Hichea hi amanu jong ainsung jotna sambuh ahung gei geiyin naosen chu athitai.
Chuin Pakaiyin alhachapa Ahijah themgaopa henga anaseisa dungjuiyin Israel pumpin naosen chu avuidoh-uvin apul adousoh keiyuvin ahi.
Jerobo’am thilbol anatoh, itobanga gal anabola chule itobanga lengvai anapoh ham, ti thusim chu vetan aboncha chu Israel lengte thusimbua kijih lutsoh hel ahitai.
Jerobo’amin lengvai anapohna chu kum som ni le kum ni alhingin, chuin amajong athitan, apu apate toh akijam khomin, chule achapa Nadab kitipan ama khel in lengvai apotai.

Solomon chapa Rehobo’am kitipa chun Judah gamsunga lengvai anapoi. Lengvai apoh pat hin Rehobo’am ama kum kum som li le kum khat alhingtai; Pakaiyin Israel phung chujat lah a ama min kiphah poh jingna dia adeilhen Jerusalem khopi sunga chun kum som le kum sagi sungin lengvai anapoi. Rehobo’am hi anu min Na’amah akitin, Ammon mite numei khat anahi.

Hichelai hin Judah gam miten Pakai mitmun thilse aboltauvin, apu apateu jouse sang sanga jong achonset joh uva hitobang chonset aboldoh “jeh-un amahon Pakai chu aphindoh-uvin, Pakai jong achunguva nasa tah-in akitomlah tan ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh amaho hin doi houna khomol tampi akisem’uvin, molsong akiphu’uvin, lhang sang lai lai le thingna dum noi tin a mol-khom akiphut’uvin ahi.

Chujongle gamsunga chun pasal notia pang jong ana umtauve. Pakaiyin Israel chate masanga kona anadel mangsa namtin vaipi ho chonna thet umtah tah athilbol bang banguvin amahon jong thil anabol’uvin anachon jeng tauve.
Rehobo’am leng chankal kum nga lhin kumin Egypt lengpa Shishak kitipa chu Jerusalem khopi sat din ahung kontou tai;

Shishak lengpa hin Pakai insunga houin ding thil kikhol jouse leh lengpa insunga thil kikhol jouse abonchan akichomdoh tan ahi; hiti hin thil ijakai abonchan anapomang soh hel’in ahi. Shishak hin Solomon semsa sana ompho jouse jong akilah tai;

hiche sana ompho ho khel ding hin Rehobo’am lengpan sum-eng ompho jeng akisemlo tan ahi; hiche sum-eng ompho ho jong hi lengpa in-ngah a pang in-ngah sepaite chunga sepai vaibola pang lamkaite khut’ a chun apen achinsah tai.
Rehobo’am lengpa chu Pakai houin sunga ahung lut phat phat leh in-ngah sepaiten sumeng ompho ho hi apojiuvin, chutengle ahinle poh kit’uvin in-ngah sepaite pansatna indan sunga chun akoi jiuve.
Rehobo’am thilbol anatoh adang jouse jong aboncha chu Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh bel hilou ham?
Ahin Rehobo’am le Jerobo’am kah a chun kitat louhel’in gal anasoh jing jengin ahi.

Chuin Rehobo’am jong apu apate toh akijam khomtan, David khopia chun apu apate lah a avuitauve. Anu hi amin Na’amah akitin, Ammon numei khat anahi. Chujouvin achapa Abi’jam kitipan ama khel’in lengvai apopai paitan ahi.
Nebat chapa Jerobo’am lengchan kal kum som le kumget nungin Abi’jam kitipa hin Judah gamsunga lengvai ahinpo pantai.
Abi’jam kitipa hin Jerusalem khopia kum thum sungin lengvai apoi. Anu chu amin Ma’acah akitin, Abishalom kitipa chanu ahi.

Ama jong hi ama masanga apa Rehobo’am chonset bang bangin achonsen, aumchan bangin aumin, athilbol bang bang aboltai; apu David lungput bangin lung apupon, Pakai a-Pathen mudin jong alungthim pumpin akitah deh poi.

Ahivangin David phatna jal a Pakai a-Pathenin ama hi thaomei vah a vah din Jerusalem khopi ngah ding chapa khat ahinsah-in, ama ban a leng a chansah tai, Jerusalem khopia chun ama hi atungdoh tan ahi.
Ipijeh-inem itileh David chun Pakai mitmun thildih jeng anabol’in, ahinlaisen Pakaiyin athupeh tapou chu anit soh keiyin nahsah mon akoi khapoi, Hit mipa Uri’ah chunga akhansetna chu bou anahi.
Rehobo’am hinlaisen Rehobo’am le Jerobo’am kah a gal anaum jing jenge.
Abi’jam natoh thilbol adang jousejong, atohdoh chengse chu, aboncha Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hilou ham? Abi’jam le Jerobo’am kah a jong gal aum jing jin ahi.
Chuin Abi’jam jong chu apu apate toh akijam khomin, mihon along chu David khopia avuitauve. Chule achapa Asa kitipa chun ama khel’in lengvai apotai.
Israel lengpa Jerobo’am lengchan kal kum som ni lhin kumin Asa hin Judah gamsunga lengvai ahinpo pan tan ahi.
Asa hin Jerusalem khopia kum som li le kum khat sungin lengvai anapoi. Ama jong hi anu min Ma acah akitin Abish’alom chanu ma ma ahiye.
Asa vang hin apu David chonna le athilbol umchan bangin Pakai mitmun thildih jeng cha anabole.
Gamsunga pasal notia panga akijoh ho jong chu Asan asumangin, apu apate semdoh milim doi kisemthu jouse jong apaidoh soh keiye.

Chujongle anu Ma’acah jeng jong lengnu ahina a konin akaidoh jenge; ijeh-inem itileh Ma’acah hin Ashe’rah doiya manchah ding thet umtah doi khat akisemdoh-e; Asa hin hiche anu milim semthu hi aphuh lhun Kidron vadunga meiyin ahalvam tai.
Amavang khomol dunga doiphung ho chu asumang deh poi. Hijongleh Asa chu ahinlai sungsen Pakaiya alungthim apumpin akitah jing jeng theiye.
Chule Asa hin Pakai houin sunga chun apa thilto chengse leh ama thilto chengse chu apolut soh keiyin ahi, hiche ho hi dangka le sana chule manchah thille lo ahi.
Hichelai hin Asa le Ba’asha kitipa Israel lengpa chu ahinkho lhum keiyin akidou lhonin, akisat sat jeng lhon tai.
Chuin Ba’asha kitipa Israel lengpa hi Judah gam sat dingin akontouvin, Judah lengpa Asa henga availhung avaikon aum thei louhelna dingin Ramah khopi kul akaikhum tan ahi.

Chuphat’in Asan jong Pakai houin sunga kimang moh dangka le sana jouse alan, lengpa insunga dinga kimang moh dangka le sana jong abonchan achom khomsoh keiyin asohte khut’a ahengin, chuin Asa lengpa hin asohte chu Damascus khopia cheng Syria lengpa, Hezion chapa, Tabrim’mon chapa Benhadad kitipa henga chun asol’in hitin agaseisah-e,

“Kapa le napa kah a kihoutohna anaum bang chun nang le kei kah a jong kihoutohna nei hite; vetan, keiman nang peh ding dangka le sana kahin thot’e; hijeh chun chen lang Israel lengpa Ba’asha toh nakihou tohna gasukeh jengin, chutileh aman gal eibol khumna konin kinung toldoh kit thei tante,” tin agaseisah-in ahi.

Chuphat’in Benhadad chun Asa lengpa thusei adeiyin, athun anung tan, Israel khopi jouse satgam din asepaite leh alamkai jouseu asol’in ahileh, amaho chun Ijon khopi toh, Dan khopi toh, Abel-beth-ma’acah khopi toh Chin’neroth gamkaise se leh Naphtali gamsungse se chu abonchan ajousoh keitauve.
Hiche gal thusim hi ajah doh phat’in Ba’asha kitipa hin Ramah khopia kulpi akaibanpi chu ahaiyin Tirzah khopia agacheng tan ahi.

Chuphat’in Asa lengpa’n Judah gamsung mite khen neilou hel’in akoukhomsoh keiyin, miho ahungun Ramah khopi sahna song jouse leh ainthil abonchan alhoh mangsoh hel’ uvin, Ba’asha insah banpi chu aphe-lha jenguvin ahi; hichea inthil chengse chun Asa lengpa’n Benjamin gamsunga Geba khopi le Mizpah khopi asan ahi.

Asa thilbol anatoh adang amoh chengse jong, athahatna ahin, anatoh abonchan khopi asahdoh ho geiyin jong, ahatna jouse hi aboncha Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lutsoh hel hilou ham? Asa chu atehset lamin akengphang teni adam mon ahi.
Asa jong chu apute apate toh akijam khomin, mihon apu David khopi sunga chun apu apate lah a avui tauve; chuin achapa Jehosh’aphat chun ama khel’in lengvai anapoi.
Judah lengpa Asa lengchan kal kum ni lhin kumin Jerobo’am chapa Nadab kitipa hi Israel chunga lengvaipon ahung pang pantan ahi. Nadab hi Israelte chunga kum ni sungin lengvaipon anapange.
Ama hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng jeng anabol jin, apa nung nung ajuiyin, apan Israel achonset sahna bang bangin ama jong achonsen ahi.

Is’sachar phunga mi Ahi’jah chapa Ba ‘asha kitipa chun Nadab dounan thu aseilen ahi; chujongle Ba’ash ahin ama chu Philistine te gamsunga Gib’bethon khoa chun asat lumden tan ahi; ijehinem itileh Nadab le Israel pumpin Gibbethon khopi chu agaum khumu ahi.
Hiti hin Judah lengpa Asa lengchan kal kum thum lhin kumin-Ba’ashan Nadab chu athat’in amajoh Nadab khel chun lengvaipon a pang tan ahi.

Ba’asha hi leng ahung chan jou jouvin Jeroba’am insung mite chu athat that jengin abon chauvin athatgam tai; Pakaiyin alhacha Ahijah kitipa Shiloh khoa mipa kama thu aseisa, hiche Pakai thusei dungjuiya, Jerobo’am insung chu asuh beihela, mihem anah hai tapou atha gam kahsen abolin, khat’a khat jeng cha jong ahoitapoi.
Hiche hi Jerobo’am in Israelte chonsetna apuilut’a achonset sah, hiche achonset jal a hitobanga hi soh ahi; hitobanga achonjeh a chu Jerobo’am chun Pakai Israel Pathen chu aphin lung hang ahitai.
Nadab natoh athilbol adang amoh chengse, aman atohdoh chengse chu aboncha Israel lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hilou ham?
Asa le Israel lengpa Ba’asha kah a jong ahinkho lhum keiyin gal anasoh jing jengin ahi.
Judah lengpa Asa lengchan kal kum thum lhin kuma Ahijah chapa Ba’asha kitipa hin Tirzah khopia chu Israel chunga lengvai ahinpoh pan ahin, kum som ni le kum li sungin lengvai apoi.
Ama jong hin Pakai mitmun thilse se jeng anabol jin, Jerobo’am nung nung ajuiyin, Israelte achonset sahna lampi jenga chun achon jin ahi.
Chuin Hana’ni chapa Jehu henga Pakaiyin Ba’asha douna thu ahinseiyin, hi tin ati;

“Keiman nang hi nemcha a kon, leivui lah a kona kadop sanga kamite Israel lamkaiya kapansah a konin nangma Jerobo’am nung nunga nachen, ama umchan jeng najomin, kamite Israel hi nachonset sah kit’in. amaho chonset boljeh hin keima neiphin lung hang tai;
neihin vetan, keiman Ba’asha le ainsung mite kasuhmanga kaphet ngim hel ding, nangma insung hi Jerobo’am kitipa Nebat chapa insung kabolna bang banga kabol ding ahi.
Ba’asha insung koi koi hijongleh khopi sunga thiden jouse chu uichaten aneh a, gamlah a thiden jouse chunga leng vachaten aneh diu ahiye,” ati.
Ba’asha natoh thilbol adang amoh chengse, ipi pi anabol ham, chule athahatna geiya chu Israel lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiya hilou ham’?
Ba’asha jong apu apate toh akijam khomin, hijeh chun Tirzah khoa avuitauve; chuin achapa Elah kitipa chun ama khel in lengvai apotai.

Hiche kalvala chu Hana’ni chapa Ba’asha le ainsung mite douna a Pakaiyin Jehu themgaopa kama thu anaseiya, Ba’ashan Pakai mitmua thilse abolna chengse jeh le akhut tah a thilse abola Pakai aphin lung hanga Jerobo’am insung mite umchan bang banga aumjeh, chutengle Jerobo’am insung asuhgam jeh jong ahi, hitia aseina chu.
Judah gam lengpa Asa lengvaipoh kal kum som ni le kum gup jouvin Ba’asha chapa Elah chun Israel chunga achenna khopi Tirzah a chun lengvai ahinpo panin, kum ni sungin analeng change.

Hichea chun alhacha sepai khat, Zimri kitipa chu Elah sakol kangtalai akeh khatjen chunga lamkaiya pang ahin, ama hin Elah adoutai; Elah hi Tirzah khoa auma, Tirzah khoa insung vaipoa pang Arza-insunga lengpitwi adonkham pet tah chun,
Zimri ahung vah lut’in, Judah lengpa Asa lengchan kal kum som ni le kum sagi lhin kum chun Elah hi asat lhun athat tai, chujongle ama khel’in ama leng achang pai paitan ahi.

Zimri hin lengvai ahinpoh poh a pat, laltouna ahung touva konin Ba’asha insung mite abonchan athat gamin agolle apaite ahin, Ba’asha phunga mite lah a chun pasal khat’a khat jeng cha jong ahinghoi tapoi.
Ba’asha douna Pakaiyin Jehu themgao kama asei dungjuiyin Ba’asha insung mite chu abonchan Zimrin a that gamhel tai;
ajeh chu Ba’asha chonset jouse leh achapa Elah chonsetna, Israel achonset sah lhon jeh le hitobanga achon lhona milimdoi asemdoh lhon jeh a Pakai Israel Pathen aphin lung hang jeh lhon ahiye.
Elah thilbol anatoh adang jouse ahin, atohdoh chengse chu aboncha Israel lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiyah hilou ham?

Judah lengpa Asa leng chan kal kum som ni le kum sagi lhin kumin Tirzah khopia Zimri chun ni sagi sungin lengvai ahinpo pantan ahi. Hichepet a hi sepaiten Gib-bethon kiti Philistine te khopi aga um’uva gal agabol pet tah-u ahin,

hikoma ngahmun sema gabol sepaite hin Zimri thilbol hi ajatauvin, “Zimrin leng adouvin, lengpa athat tai,” tia kisei ajadoh tauve; hijeh chun Israel pumpi akihou toh-uvin sepai lamkaipa Omri kitipa chu ngahmun laiya chun hiche nikho ma man Israel chunga lengvai po din asemtauve.
Hijeh chun Gib-bethon khopia konin Omri jong akontouvin ahileh Israel miten abonchan ajui touvun, Tirzah khopi chu aga-um tauvin ahi.
Khopi alah peh-u amudoh phat’in Zimri chu lengpa inchung sanga chun akaltouvin, hiche leng inpi sunga hin ama le ama mei akihal denin athiden tai,
hiche abol lo na pen chu achonset jeh, Pakai mitmua thilse jeng abola, Jerobo’am umchan achonna ajuiya, Israel chonsetna apui lut’a achonset sah a hichejeh a ama jong achonsea akisim jeh ahipene.
Zimri natoh thilbol adang dang, leng douna thil abol ho jong aboncha Israel lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiyah hilou ham?
Hichelai hin Israel mite chu keh ni akisouvin, mipi akeh khat chun Ginath chapa Tibni chu ajuiyin, ama chu leng chansah ding agouve, chule akeh khat man Omri nung ajuijo tauve.
Ahinla Omri nung jui miho hin Ginath chapa Tibni nung jui miho chu ajoujo tauve; hitobang hin Tibni athitan, Omri aleng chang tai.

Judah lengpa Asa leng chan kal kum somthum le kum khat lhin kum chun Omri jong Israel chunga ahung leng chang panin, chule kum som le kum ni sungin lengvai apon, kumgup sungin Tirzah khopia lengvai a napoi.

Omri hin Samaria thinglhang chu Shemer khut’a konin dangka talent nin anachoi; chuin athinglhang chu kulpi akaikhumin, hichea khopi asahdoh chu amin Samaria asah-e; athinglhang gam neipa Shemer min aputsah anahi.
Omri jong hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng anabol’in, ama masanga leng dang jouse sangin jong thilse ahabol cheh jengin ahi.

Ijeh inem itileh ama jong hi Nebat chapa Jerobo’am chon bang bangin achonin, Israel achonset sahna chengsea chun aman jong achonset sah kit’in, milimdoi jeng asemdoh kit’in Pakai Israel Pathen chu aphin lung hangin ahi.
Omri natoh athilbol adang dang, atohdoh chengse ahin, athahat asodoh na jouse ahin, aboncha chu Israel lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keiyah hilou ham?
Omri jong apu a pate toh akijam khomin, Samaria khopia avuitauve; chuin ama khel din achapa Ahab chun lengvai apotai.
Judah lengpa Asa lengchan kal kum som thum le kumget lhin kumin Omri chapa Ahab chun Israelte chunga lengvai apopan tai; Samaria khopia chun kum som ni le kum ni sungin aleng change.
Omri chapa Ahab kitipa hin ama masanga leng dang jouse sangin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng anabol’in ahi.

Aman Nebat chapa Jerobo’am chonna chu bailam chan ajom jengin, achonset bang bangin achonsen, Sidon mite lengpa Ethba’al kitipa chanu Jezebel kitinu chu jin akipuiyin, akihei mangdel jengin Ba’al doi ahouvin, chibai aboh tai.
Samaria khopia chun Ba’al houin khat asadoh jengin, hiche Ba’al houin sunga hin maicham khat jong asemdoh pai paiyin ahi.
Ahab hin Ashe’rah doilim khat jong asemdoh-e. Ama masanga Israel leng adang dangjouse sangin Ahab hin Pakai Israel Pathen chu ahalung hansah dehset jengin ahi.

Ahab nikho lai hin Bethel khoa mi Hi’el kitipa chun Jericho khopi asa panin ahi; Hi’el hin khopi khom tundohna dingin achapa Abi’ram achanlon, asah jousoh phat’in jong akelkot phungjouse phudohna dingin achapa adongpen pa Segub kitipa chu achanloi; hiche hi Nun chapa Joshua kama Pakaiyin thu anaseisa dungjuiya anasoh ahiye.

Gilead gama Tishbe khoa Tishbe kho mi Elijah kitipa hin Ahab jah a aseitai, “A-angsunga kadin jing Pakai Israel Pathen hing jing min a kasei ahi, keiman thu kapeh louva ahileh hiche kum phabep sunga hi daitwi jong gotwi jong hung kang hel ding ahi,” ati.
Chujongle Elijah henga chun Pakaiyin thu ahinseiyin,
“Hikoma kon hin kipatdoh jengin lang niso lam a chen, Jordan vadung niso lam a Cherith vadunga khun gakisel tan.
Cherith vadunga twi nadon ding ahin, an nathah dia jong va-ahte kanganse ahitai,” ati.
Hijeh chun Elijah jong achen Pakai thusei bang bangin agabol tan ahi; achen Jordan vadung niso lam a Cherith vadunga aga chengtai.
Vadunga chun Elijah neh din va-ah tenjingkah le changlhah le sa ahinpoh peh jiuvin, nilhah teng jongleh changlhah le sa ahinpoh peh jiuve; Elijah chun Cherith vadunga twi chu adonji jin ahi.
Gamsunga go ajuh lou phat’in vadung twi jeng jong chu phat chom khat jouvin akang tan ahi.
Pakaiyin Elijah henga thu ahinseiyin hitin ati,
“Kipatdoh-in lang Sidon gama Zar’ephath khoa chen lang hikoma khun gacheng tan; vetan, keiman hikoma khun nangma vah din meithainu khat thu kaseipeh tai,” ati.

Hijeh chun Elijah jong akipatdoh pai paiyin Zar’ephath khoa achetai; chuin Zar’ephath khopi kelkot ahung gei phat’in vetan, kelkot phung dunga chun meithainu khat hin thingkang anachomin ahi; Elijah chun amanu hi akouvin ajah a aseitai, “Kadon dingin, lungset tah-in khon khat’a twi neihin dop peh tei teiyin,” tin athum e.
Meithainu twi dom dinga achea ahileh, Elijah chun amanu chu akou kit’in aseitai, “Lungset tah-in an kam khat beh nakhut’a neihin choitha peh tei teiyin,” ati pai kit’ in ahi.

Ahin amanu’n aseitai, “Hing jing Pakai na-Pathen mina kasei ahi, keiman changlhah kansa kanei hih hel’e, bel sunga changbong khutdim khatseh kanei tan, hai sunga thao them chabou kaneitai; tua thingkang ni ham kachom jong hi hiche changbong hileh thao hi kasuh toa keileh kachapa dinga kakan a, kaneh jou teng lhon leh kathi pai pai lhon dinga kagel ahitai,” ati.

Chuphat’in amanu jah a Elijah jong chun aseitai, “Kicha hih beh-in, chen lang nasei bang chun gabol loiyin, ahin hiche lah a kon chu amasan kei din changlhah lhon khat hin kang masan, neihin choipeh loiyin, ajou tengleh nang le nachapa ding kang nan nate.

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai Israel Pathen chun hitin aseiye, ‘Bel sunga chang bong chun beitih anei louhel ding, hai sunga thaotwi jong chu beitih nei louva um ding, gamsunga Pakaiyin gotwi ahinlonsah masanga hitia chu neng jing jeng ding ahi,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Hichun meithainu jong achen Elijah sei bang bangin agabol tai; amanu ahin, Elijah ahin, chule amanu insung mi ahiuvin hiche an chu ni sot tah aneuvin ahi.
Bel sunga an jong chu abei thei tapon, hai sunga thaotwi jong chu alhasam khapoi, Pakaiyin Elijah jah a asei bang bangin aum tai.
Hiche nung hin ain neinu meithainu chapa chu anatai; achapa nat chu akhoh behseh jeng tan, akhon khon nan achapa chu ahaisam pai tai.

Chuphat’in meithainun jong Elijah jah a aseiyin, “Vo Pathen mipa, ipi ding pen a nangman kei neikidoupi hi tam? Kachonset jouse phongdoh kit’a kachapa thalo dinga nangma kahenga hung nahim ong!” tin asamjah tan ahi.

Chuphat’in Elijah chun meithainu jah a aseiyin, “Nachapa chu keima neipen,” tin athumin; chuin aphei chunga konin achapa chu akidop doh pai paiyin indan chung nunga age-na ji indan a chun adomtouvin, ama lupna jalkhuna chun alupsah tai.
Chuin Elijah chu Pakai henga ataovin, “Vo Pakai ka-Pathen, nangman hiche khopemna kanei hiche meithainu jengjong hi nahamset sah a achapa nathapeh ding hi tam?” atin ahi.
Chujongle chapangpa chunga chun ama le ama thumvei jen akigol jangin Pakaiya oging tah-in ataovin, “O Pakai ka-Pathen, hiche chapangpa hi asunga hinna hung lut kit hen,” ati.
Chuphat’in Elijah taona chu Pakaiyin anop peh tan, chapangpa sunga ahinna ahung nung lut kit’in ahileh chapangpa chu ahingdoh tai.
Chuin Elijah jong chun chapangpa chu ahinkaiyin, indan chung nunga konin insunga ahin puisuh pai paiyin anu apetai; hichea hin Elijah hin aseiyin, “Vetang, nachapa hi ahing-ah hita hi!” atipeh-e.

Chutah chun meithainun jong Elijah jah a aseipai jengin, “Tunvang hiche nabola kon hin nangma Pathen mi nahi, ti kichentah-in kahen, chujongle nakama naseidoh Pakai thusei jong hi adih mong monge, ti kahetai,” ati.
Phat sotpi jou, kum thum nungin Pakaiyin Elijah henga thu ahinseitan hitin ati, “Chen lang nang le nang Ahab henga gakilah tan, ajeh chu keiman leiset chunga go kajuh sah ding ahitai,” ati.
Hijeh chun Elijah jong ama le ama Ahab kimusah din achetai; hiche lai hin Samaria gama kel akhoh lheh jengin ahi.
Hijeh chun Ahab jong hin insung vaipoa pang Obadi’ah kitipa chu akouvin ahi. Obadi’ah vang hin giltah a Pakai anagin ahin,
Pakai themgao jouse Jezebel lengnu’n athagam pet’a jong chu Obadi’ah hin themgao ja khat jen apuiya, som nga chenga songko khat cheh a agasela, an le twi agathah ji ahiye.

Ahab hin Obadi’ah jah a aseiyin, “Chen lang gamsung gakholsoh keiyin, twinah jouse gaven phaicham jouse jong gachonsoh keiyin; ijem itileh hamhing pouna mun khat beh imudohuva, sakol phabep le sakolpol phabep beh ihinsouva, gancha phabep beh imah thah sah lou diu ahi,” ati.
Hiti hin amani chu gamsung khol ding chu akikeh hop lhonin, Ahab jong amatah akipanin gamkai lang khat jonin achen, Obadi’ah jong chu amatah akipan jengin gamkai lang khatma jonin achetai.
Obadi’ah hi lampia ahung hunga ahileh vetan, Elijah chun analam tinin ahi; Elijah ahi chu Obadi’ah hin ahepai jengin, akun paiyin jabolna apen aseitai, “Kapu Elijah nahilou haimo ong?” tia adoh leh,
Elijah chun Obadi’ah adonbut’in, “Keima kahinai. Chen lang napu Ahab jah a, ‘Vetan, hikoma hin Elijah aume,’ gatin,” ati.
Ahivangin Obadi’ah chun aseiyin, “Ipi pen tah a keiman chonsetna kaneiya, nangman nasohpa kei hi Ahab khut’a neipeh doh-a ama thasah ding neiti hitam?

Hing jing Pakai na-Pathen min a kasei ahi, kapu Ahab’in nangma holna dinga mi asol nalou koimacha jat le lenggam aum tapoi; amisolna mite chun, ‘Elijah aumpoi,’ tia asei tenguleh Ahab chun hiche jat mite chuleh lenggam chutoh nangma hi amudoh hih mong nauve, tia kihahselna abol thu thu jeng ahi.
Ahinla tun nangman, ‘Chen lang napu jah a gaseiyin, “Vetan, hikoma hin Elijah aume,” gatin’neiti.

Nangma kadalhah lhah-in Pakai lhagaovin nangma kahet khah louna mun khat’ a nalhoh mang kit’in tin, keima cheng ting Ahab gaseipeh mong jong leng, amanla nang namudoh deh pontin, kaneocha lhah a nasohpa hi Pakai gingtah mi kahivangin, Ahab chun eithalo bep ding ahi.

Jezebel lengnu’n Pakai themgaote atha laiya keima thilbol chu min najah a asei khah loulai ham, itobang tah a Pakai themgao mi ja khat chu som nga nga a songko khat cheh a kasela, chule abonchauva an neh ding le twi don ding kathah ham?
Ahivangin tun nangman naseiyin, ‘Chen lang napu jah a gaseiyin, “Vetan, hikoma hin Elijah aume,” gatin,’ nati; hichea hi aman keima eithalo tei tei ding ahibouve,” atitai.
Chuphat’in Elijah chun aseiyin, “A-angsunga kadin jing thanei chung nungpen Pakai min a kasei ahi, tunia hi keiman Ahab chu katahsa tah a kakimusah tei tei ding ahinai,” atitai.
Hijeh chun Obadi’ah jong Ahab kimupi din achetai; chuin Ahab jah a chun aseiyin, Ahab jong Elijah kimupi din achetan ahi.
Ahab hin Elijah amudoh phat chun, Elijah jah a chun Ahab’in adongin, “Israel bol gentheipa, hiche hi nang nahi hijah ong?” atileh;
Elijah chun adonbut’in, “Keiman Israel kabol gentheipoi; nangjoh chun nabol genthei ahitai, napa insung mite toh Pakai thupeh jouse abonchan nadon dauvin, Ba’al doi jeng nahoujo tauve.

Hijeh chun tun Israel mi abonchan hiche Carmel molsanga hin kei koma gakou lut dingin mi sol loiyin, Ba’al doi themgaova pang ho mi ja li le som nga chutoh, Asherah doi themgaova pang mi ja li ho, Jezebel ankong phunga kivah jing jeng ho chutoh gapui lut sah temin,” ati. “
Hijeh chun Ahab hin mi asol’in Israel chate abonchan agakousah-in, Carmel molsanga chun themgao jouse jong akhomsoh hel tai.

Chuphat’in Elijah jong mipi henga chun ahung kikhin naiyin aseitai, “Phat itih chan mong mong nang hon lung ni nagel jing jeng nah nalai diu ham? Pakai kitipa hi Pathen ahiya ahileh ama chu hou jenguvin lang, ahilouva Ba’al natiu jongleh hou jeng tau?” ati. Ahivangin mipin Elijah chu thu cheng khat beh chanjong adonbut pouve.
Chuphat’in Elijah jong chun mipi jah a aseiyin, “Pakai themgao lah a keima changseh hi eikihinghoi ahitai; Ba’al doi themgao ho vang ja li le som nga jen alhinguve.

Amaho le kei din bongchal ni hinkai lut’uvin lang, amahon bongchal khat kilhen masah-uvin tin, that’u hen lang asemtel jou tengu leh thinglom chunga khun koiyu hen, mei vang atithei lou diu ahi; kenjong bongchal khatjoh chu that ing ting, thinglom chunga khu kajam ding, anoiya mei katithei louhel ding ahi.

Chutengle nang ho Ba’al themgao ho, nahou’u doi henga chun taovun lang, kei jong Pakai minin taovinge; hichea meikonga hindonbut pen pen chu Pathen dih ahi,” ati. Hichun mipin abonchan kitoh chet’in adonbut’uvin, “Asei hi apha lheh jeng bouve,” atitauve.

Hijeh chun Elijah jong chun Ba’al themgaoho jah a aseiyin, “Nang hon bongchal khat khu kilhen masahuvin lang hin kigon masah uvin, ijehinem itileh nang ho atamjo nahiuve; chujongle nahou’u Ba’al min chun hung taovun, hintin mei vang natithei louhel diu ahi,” ati.

Hiti chun Ba’al themgao hon bongchal amaho manchah dinga hung kitohdoh chu akimat’uvin, athat’uvin agontoh soh phat’uvin jingkah a pat sunkim geiyin Ba’al min chun atao tao jenguvin hitin aseiyuve, “Vo Ba’al, neihou tei teiyun!” atiuvin ahi. Ahivanginla ogina ogin jong akijapha pon, koimachanjong ahindonbut pouve. Amaho chu amaicham semsau kimvela chun akisuh chop akitou chop jenguvin ahi.

Sunkim ahipai phat’in Elijah chun amaho hi atot chavaiyin hitin aseiye, “Hakouvun, ama jong pathen khat hiya chu; alung gel pet ham, avah doh a ham, ahiloule khola chedoh ham hitin, ahilouva ahijongle aihmua hitin, suh khah tei tei ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun amaho ahapen cheh jenguvin, achonna ngai banguvin chemjamin aki-atchen chen jenguvin, tengchan akisun chen chenjeng tauve, athiu ahung longdoh kahsen hiti chun abol jenguvin ahi.
Hiti chun nisa kiheiya pat kithoi phat geiyin apeng peng jenguvin ahileh, imacha ogin la akija pon, koiman jong adonbut pouvin, ngaisah-in jong aneipeh deh tapouve.

Chutah chun Elijah jong chun mipi abonchauva jah a aseiyin, “Neihin nailut’uvin,” atia ahileh; mipi abonchauvin ahenga ahung kikhin lutsoh tauve. Hichun Elijah hin Pakai maicham akivochimsa chu asemphan ahi.
Chujongle Elijah hin masang laiya Pakaiyin ajah a thu anaseiya hitia atipa, “Namin Israel kiti ding ahi,” tia aseipeh pa Jacob chapa phung jat dungjuiyin songtum som le ni alhoh doh-in,
hiche songtum chengse chun Pakai min din maicham khat asemdoh tai. Chule maicham kimvela chun twikong ni tejen twilam khat asemin ahi.

Eiijah chun thinglom jong chu agol gol’in ajamin, chuin bongchalsa chu asemtel tel’in thinglom chunga chun ajam tai. Hichun Elijah hin aseiyin, “Twi dimset set bel li gadom’uvin lang pumgo thilto chungle thinglom chunga khun chap kot soh keiyuvin,” ati.
“Bol kit’uvin,” atin ahileh; mihon avel’in abol kit tauve. Aman asol kit leuvin, “Thumvei lhin nan gabol kit’uvin,” atia ahileh; mihon jong athumvei lhin nan abol kit tauve.
Hichun maicham kimvela hin twi along dimset tan, twilam jong chu twi adimset jeng tai.

Kilhaina thilto phat alhin phat’in Elijah themgaopan ahinjon lut paiyin, chule aseitai, “Vo Pakai, Abraham, Isaac chule Israel Pathen, tuni nikho hin Israelte lah a Pathen chu nangma nahin, keima hi nasohpa kahi, hijeh a chu hiche thil hi aboncha nangma thusah a kaboldoh ahi, ti hi mipi hetsah tei teiyin.
Neihouvin O Pakai, neihou tei teiyin; chutile hiche mite hin nangma hi Pakai Pathen nahin, chule nan gin alungthim jouseu naleheipeh ahitai, ti ahetdoh diu ahi,” ati.

Chutah chun Pakaiya konin meikong ahung leng lhan, pumgo thilto bongchalsa chu akavam jengin, thinglom jong akavamsoh tan, songtum jouse jong ahulgon, leivui jong aleugo jengin, twilama twi vei jeng jong chu ahulgo hel jenge.
Mipin hiche thilsoh hi amudoh phat’uvin amai tola asulut cheh-uvin aseitauve, “Pakai kitipa hi Pathen mong mong ahinai, Pakai kitipa hi Pathen mong mong ahinai,” atitauve.

Chuphat’in Elijah chun miho jah a aseiyin, “Ba’al themgaoho chu manloiyun, khat’a khat jeng cha jong jamdoh sah hih hel’uvin,” atileh; mihon jong abonchauvin amansoh keitauve. Elijah chun Ba’al themgao ho chu Kishon vadunga apuisuh pai paiyin hikoma chun agathat gamtai.
Elijah chun Ahab jah a aseiyin, “Chetouvin lang naneh ding ding ganen lang nadon ding ding gadon tan; ijehinem itileh go juhna dinga van kithin husa akijai,” ati.
Hijeh chun Ahab jong an ne ding le twi don dingin achetou loiye. Hichun Elijah jong Carmel molvuma akaltouvin, tola chun akun chah kheh jengin, akhup teni kah a amai asulut’in akun mang hel jenge.

Chujouvin Elijah chun asohpa jah a aseiyin, “Lungset tah-in chetouvin lang twikhanglen lam khu gave tan,” tin asol tai. Ama jong achetouvin agaven, chule aseipeh tai, “Imacha aumpoi,” ati. Ahinla Elijah chun aseiyin, “Sagi vei jen chen lang gaven,” ati.

Hitia hi abol leh asagi vei lhin nan aseidoh tai, “Vetan, meilhang neocha, mihem khut phang te bep khat hi twikhanglen lailunga konin ahung kitungdoh-e,” ati. Chuphat’in Elijah chun aseipeh-in, “Chetouvin lang Ahab jah a gaseipeh-in, ‘Nakangtalai kigot loiyin chesuh loi jengin, achutilouva ahileh gon nalap den intin, nachethei lou ding ahi,’ tin gaseipeh tan,” ati.
Chomkah louvin van ahung thim cheh cheh jengin, meilhang ahung kikhom khom jeng tan, hui ahung nung pantai; chuin go hajuh juh-in ahung jun ahi. Ahab chu kangtalaiyin akitol’in Jezreel lama achetai.
Ahin Elijah chunga Pakai ban thahat ahung chun hijeh chun aman jong atai akigah loiyin Ahab masanga alhaijel jengin, Jezreel kotphunga analam tin kit tai.
Ahab chun Jezebel jah a Elijah thilbol abonchan aseipeh soh keiyin, itobang tah a Ba’al themgao jouse chemjama asat lih soh hitam, ti thusim aseipeh tai.

Hichun Jezebel hin Elijah henga mi asol’in sottolle pa chu Elijah jah a hitin agaseisah tai, “Jing nikhoa tuphat dontah a hi nangman natha miho hinkho khat nasuh mang bang banga chu ken jong nangma hinkho kasuh mang louva ahileh kahou le kabeh doi ho hin keima chuti chun eibol jengu hen, akhoh cheh jon jong eibolu hen,” agatisah-e.
Chuphat’in Elijah jong akichatan, akipatdoh loiyin akihinso theina dingin ajam mangin, Judah gamsunga Beer-sheba geiyin ahung tai, asohpa vang chu hikoma chun adalhai.

Amavang chu achangseh-in gammang lam jonin nikhat achebe nalaiyin, ahung hungin longlao phung noi khat’a hin atoutai; hikoma hin athina dingin ataovin aseitai, “Vo Pakai, kakhopset jeng tai, kahinkho hi lamang jengin, ajeh chu keijong kapu kapate sangin kaphajo deh tapoi,” atin;
Longlao phung joi khat’a hin alumin aihmutan ahi; hichun vetan, Vantil khat hin Elijah ahin thamin ajah a aseitai, “Thouvin lang an nen,” atin ahi.

Eiijah jong chun avet’a ahileh, vetan, alulhun koma song chung el-leng lung khat’a hin changlhah lhon khat kansan anaumin, twi bel khat twi dimset’in akitunge. Elijah chun changlhah chu anen, twi jong chu adonin alum kit tai.
Chujouvin Pakai vantil chu anivei nan ahung kit’in, Elijah chu ahintham kit’in aseiye, ‘Thoudoh-in lang an nen, ajeh chu nakhol che-na ding hi agamla lheh jenge,” tin aseiye.
Hijeh chun Elijah jong athouvin an anen, twi adonin, hiche an aneh husan chun nisom li le jan som li sungin lam ajot jouvin, Pathen molsang Horeb geiyin achei.
Horeb molsanga chun Elijah ahungin songko sung khat’ a a jan geh tai; hichun vetan, Pakaiyin ajah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati. “Elijah, hikoma hi ipi nabol ham?” ati.

EJijah chun aseitai, “Keima hi Pakai, thanei chung nung pen Pathen din katom ngai behseh jenge; ijeh-inem itileh Israel chaten nangma kitepna adon dauvin, namaicham jouse avochimsoh hel’uvin, nathemgao jouse jong chemjamin asat lih soh tauve; kei hi kachangseh a eihing hoiyu ahin, keijeng jong tha dinga eihol hol jengu ahi,” ati.

Hichun Pakaiyin jong, “Potdoh-in lang molsanga khun Pakai angsunga gading tan,” ati. Chuin vetan, Pakai chu achen ahileh huipi hat tah le nasa tah-in anungin, molsang janglai chu asemkeh lah lah jengin, Pakai masanga songpi jouse jong chu akitatjallah lah jenge; ahinla Pakai chu hui lah a jong umdeh ahipoi; huipi anun chai phat’in ling ahung kihot pai kit’in, ahinla ling kihot lah a jong Pakai umdeh ahipoi;
ling kihojou jouvin mei ahung koujah kit jengin, hijongle la meikong lah a chu Pakai umdeh ahi kit pon ahi; meikong amitnung jong chun hamheu heovin aging jing nalaiye.

Elijah chun agin chu ajah doh phat’in aponsil chun amai akijel’in, apotdoh pai paiyin songko kama chun agadinge. Chuin vetan, ahenga ogin khat hin thu ahinseiyin hitin ati, “Elijah, hikoma ipi nabol ham?” ati.

Elijah jong chun aseiyin, “Keima hi Pakai, thanei chung nung pen Pathen din katom ngai behseh jenge; ijeh-inem itileh Israel chaten nangma kitepna adon dauvin, namaicham jouse avochimsoh hel’uvin, nathemgao jouse jong chemjam in asat lih soh tauve; kei hi kachangseh a eihing hoiyu ahin, keijeng jong tha dinga eihol hol jengu ahi,” ati.

Hichun Pakaiyin jong ajah a aseiyin, “Chen kinungle kit’in lang nahungna lampi juipeh-in, Damascus gammang lang jontan; chutia chu nalhun tengleh Hazael kitipa chu Syria gama leng chang dia thao nanu ding ahin,
chujongle Nimshi chapa Jehu chu Israel chunga leng chang dia thao nanu ding ahi; chutengleh Abelmeholah khoa Shaphat chapa Eli’sha chu nangma khela themgaova pang dinga thao nanu ding ahi.
Chuteng chuleh Hazael’in chemjama asat lih khel chu Jehun atha ding ahin, Jehun chemjama asat lih lou ajamdoh chu Elisha’n atha ding ahi.
Israel mite lah a keiman Ba’al houna dilsu loulai mihem sang sagi kakhen nah lai ding ahi, amaho hin akam’uva jong Ba’al chu achop khah lou lai hel’u ahiye,” ati

Elijah chu hikoma kon chun apotdoh paiyin acheleh Shaphat chapa Elisha chun bongchal a lou anakai pet atoh khan, amasanga bongchal to som le to ni amasan, Elisha chu bongchal to som le to ni lhinna pa chutoh akilhone. Elijah chun Elisha chu ahopan aponsil chu achunga ase-lhah peh pai.

Chuphat’in Elisha’n jong bongchal teni adalhan Elijah nung adel jengin chule aseitai, “Kanu le kapa phaten ga-lhang ting chujou teng leh nanung jui nange,” ati. Ahivangin Elijah chun ajah a aseiyin, “Nung che kit tan, ajeh chu ipi kabolpeh a na ngaito ham?” atipeh-e.

Chuin Elisha jong Elijah nung adelna konin ahung kinungle kit’in, namkoljon kai bongchal teni chu akaiyin anin athat’in, anamkoljon lhon chu atahsa lhon ahon nan meiyin atih jengin, mipi chu avah nan ahileh amahon jong anetauve. Chujouvin Elisha jong akipatdoh pai paiyin Elijah nung nung ajuitai. Elisha chu Elijah lhachan agapang tan ahi.

Syria lengpa Ben-hadad kitipa chun asepaite abonchan akhomsoh keiyin ahileh, ama pan pi mong mong chu leng somthum le ni alhingin, sakol tampi le kangtalai tamtah ahin, chuin ama akontouvin Samaria khopi aga-umin akisatpi tai.
Ben-hadad hin Samaria khopi sunga Israel lengpa Ahab henga mi sottolle phabep asolin ajah a agaseisah tai, “Ben-hadad chun hitin aseiye:
’Nadangka le nasana chu kei ding ahin; najite ahoitah tah ho le nachate jeng jong kei ding ahi,’ tin aseiye,” agatisah-e.
Hichun Israel lengpa’n adonbut’in “Vo lengpa chule kapu, nangman nasei bang bangin kei jong kanei jouse jong aboncha nanga ahitai,” ati.

Ahinla sottolle ho chu ahung kit’uvin aseitauve, “Ben-hadad chun hitin aseiye, ‘Keiman nahenga mi kahinsol’in hitin kaseisah me, “Nadangka le nasana chule najite leh nachate keima neipedoh loiyin,” katimen;

ahinla tua hi keiman jing teng tuphat dontah a hi kasepaite kahinsol ding, amaho hin nangma insung jong akhol’uva nasepaite insung jouse jong akholsoh kei diu, ipi hijongle adei dei atham khah chanu chu anop nop’a abol’uva, akilah nom nom akilah jeng diu ahi,’ tin aseiye,” atiuve.

Chuphat’in Israelte lengpa’n gamsunga loi upa chengse akoukhomin aseitai, “Kichentah-in heuvin lang chule vetem uvin, hiche Ben-hadad kitipa hin kinahna ding ahol tai; ijeh-inem itileh aman kajite leh kachate, keima dangka le kasana kilahna dingin mi ahinsol’in, hicheng hi ka-itpeh lou ahitai,” ati.
Chutah chun gamsung loi upa chengse leh mipin lengpa jah a aseiyun, “Ngaisah peh dan lang, nop jong nop peh ta hihin,” atiuve.

Hijeh chun lengpa’n jong Ben-hadad sottolle ho jah a chun aseitan ahi, “Kapu lengpa chu anaseipeh tauvin, ‘Amasa a nangman nahin ngeh chengse nasohpa keiman kabolpeh soh kei ding nahinai; ahin tua nasei vang hi nabolpeh jou taponge,’ tin anaseiye, anatiuvin,” ati. Hichun sottolle ho chu akipatdoh pai paiyuvin, Ben-hadad henga thu ahin lhut kittauve.

Chutah chun Ben-hadad jong hin aseipai jengin mi asolin ajah a aseitai, “Kanung juiya mipite dinga hi Samaria khopi sunga vutdi jeng jong khut dim khat chenga achan khop lou khop’uva kalha louva ahileh, doi le kaovin keima eithat hen lang, aval hel’in jong eibol jengu hen,” ati.
Hichun Israel lengpa’n adonbut’in, “Ben-hadad jah a anaseipeh tauvin, ‘Pasal agalvon kivonsa chu kiletsah da hen lang kisut lhah kit da hen,’ tin aseiye anatiuvin.” ati.

Ben-hadad chun lhambuh sunga leng dang ho chutoh ju adonpet’uvin hiche thu kisei hi ajan, hijeh chun asepaite jah a aseitai, “Napan mun cheh kijot tauvin,” atia ahileh; amahon jong khopi kisatpina din ama ama pan mun cheh akijotsoh kei tauve.

Hichun vetan, themgao khat hin Israel lengpa Ahab chu ahin nailut pai paiyin thu aseitai, “Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye: Nangman hiche mihonpi nasa tah a kihonlul lulpi khu namu nah am? Vetan, tunia keiman amaho khu nangma khut’a kapeh doh ding ahi; chutengleh keima hi Pakai kahi, ti nangman nahetdoh ding ahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in Ahab jong chun adong paiyin, “Koipen vangin am?” atileh; amanjong aseiyin, “Gambih dunga gamvaipoa pang ho sepaite thahat vanga najo ding ahi,” tin Pakaiyin aseiye. Hichun Ahab jong chun, “Achutileh koijoh-in gal asat pat ding ham?” atia ahileh; aman adonbut paiyin, “Nangman,” ati.
Hijeh chun Ahab’in gambih dunga gamvaipoa pang ho sepaite chu asimtoh-in ahileh, mi ja ni le somthum alhinguvin, amaho ban a chun Israel chate abonchauva asimtoh a ahileh sang sagi alhinguve.
Israelte chu nisa sunkim laiyin akondoh-uvin ahileh, Ben-hadad chu apanpi leng somthum le ni ho chutoh lhambuh sung dunga ju anadonin anakhampet tah ahiye;
gambih dunga gamvaipoa pang ho chu che masa ahiuve. Ben-hadad chun sepai gollhang ho asol masan ahileh amaho hin ajah a ahung seiyuvin, “Samaria khopia konin mi ahung vaikondoh tai,” tin aseiyui.
Ben-hadad chun aseiyin, “Miho chu chamna thubola hung hijongleu ahingin hinkaiyun lang, gal thuseiya hung hiu jongleh ahing ma man hin man’uvin,” ati.
Hitobanga hi gambih dunga gamvaipoa pang ho sepaite chu khopi sunga kona potdoh ahiuvin, Israel sepaiten amaho nung ajuiyu ahi.

Israel sepaite chun amaichang cheh-in akitopi cheh athat’uvin ahileh, Syria sepaite ajam jam jenguvin, Israelte’n amaho nung adel del jenguve; ahin Syria lengpa Ben-hadad vang chu sakol’in alhaiyin sakol them miho chutoh ajamdoh tauve.
Israel lengpa chu apotdoh-in sakolte jong akangtalai jouse jong amansoh hel’in, Syria mite chu asat chap jel jul jengin, hathan athat gam e.

Hichun Israel lengpa henga themgaopa chu ahung vah lut kit’in ajah a aseitai, “Hungin lang hung kicholdon, ipi pi nabol ding ham, ti phatechan hung gel toh temin; ijeh-inem itileh chavang lai leh nangma kisatpi dinga Syria lengpa hung kon kit ding ahi,” atipeh-e.

Hichea hin Syria lengpa sepaiten ajah a aseiyuvin, “Israelte pathente khu thinglhang gam pathen jeng ahijeh-uva Israelte khu eiho sanga thahatjo thei ahibouvui, hijeh chun phaichama kisatpi leuhen, amaho sanga eiho ihatjoh tei tei diu ahinai.
Chutengleh tun hitin thil bol temin; napanpi lengte hi ama ama panmun cheh a konin haisah soh keiyin lang, amaho khel hin sepai lamkai jeng koijon;

chutengle nangman nathigamsah sepaite jat ma ma chu simdoh kit’in lang, sakol khat khel’in sakol khat hoidoh-in, kangtalai khat khel din kangtalai khatma holdoh jengin; chutah le eihon Israelte khu phaicham laiya kisatpiu hite, itijongleh amaho sanga ihatjoh tei tei diu ahi,” atiuve. Hijeh chun amahon aseiyu hi Ben-hadad jong anomin, hitobang bang chun aboltai.
Chavang ahung lhun phat’in Ben-hadad hin Syria sepaite asimtoh-in Israel toh kisat din Aphek lama achetoutai.

Chuin Israel chate jong akisimtoh uvin neh le chah ding akigon tauve, chule Syria mite sat din akon’uvin ahi. Israel chate chu Syria mite masanga kelcha hon lhomcha bangin ngahmun akisem’uvin, Syria mite vang chu gamsung achah lha jenguvin ahi.

Chuin Pathen mi khat hi ahung vah lut’in Israel lengpa jah a ahung seitai, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Syria miten Pakai hi thinglhang pathen ahin, phaigama pathen ahipoi,’ tia aseiyu ahin, hichejeh a chu keiman hiche mipi kihonlul lui jengpi khu nangma khut’a kapeh doh ding ahin. chutengleh nang hon jong keima hi Pakai kitipa chu kahi, neihetdoh diu ahi,’ tin aseiye,” ati.

Hiti hin Israelte leh Syria mite chu ni sagi sungin akimai ngat ton ngahmuna apansa cheh uvin ahi. Ni sagi lhin nin vang gal akisat tauve; hichea hin Israel chaten Syria mite chu nikhat sung seh seh-in tol sepai jeng jeng jong mihem sang ja khat jen asat chap jeng tauve.

Israel chaten atha moh chengseu jong chu Aphek khopi lama ajamlut soh tauve; khopi sunga kidalha ahing nalai mihem sang som ni le sang sagi jong chu kulpin achimden kit tai. Ben-hadad jong ajamin khopi sunga chun indan sung nung lai khat’a hin ajamlut tai.

Hichun Ben-hadad jah a chun asepaiten aseitauve, “Lungset tah-in vetemin, Israel insunga lengte hi mi hepi themtah tah leng jeng ahiuve, tin keihon kajatauve; hijeh chun eihon khaodip pon itaibuh chenga kiveiyu hitin, iluchanguva khaohol kiveiyu hitin chutengleh Israel lengpa henga chun gapotdoh jeng temu hite; ijem itileh ama khun nahinghoi mel jong het ahipoi,” atiuve.

Hijeh chun amahon ataibuh dunguva khaodip pon akiveiyun, aluchanguva khaohol akikhiuvin, Israel lengpa henga acheuvin aseitauve, “Nasohpa Ben-hadad chun aseiyin, ‘Nahenga katao ahi, neihing hoi tei teiyin,’ ati,” tin aseitauve. Ahab chun adongin, “Ben-hadad hing nalaiya ong? Ama chu kagolpa hibouva chu,” atitai.

Ben-hadad sepaite chun ipi ahinseidoh ding ham, ti ngah lei geova umah ahiuvin, hijeh chun Ahab thusei ban chu kinloi tah-in asang pai jenguvin ajah a aseitauve, “Ahingnai, nasopi nagolpa Ben-hadad chu!” atiuve. Hichun Ahab’in jong aseiyin, “Cheuvin lang gapuidoh tauvin,” ati. Chutah chun Ben-hadad jong Ahab henga ahung vahdoh paitai; chuin Ahab’in Ben-hadad chu akangtalai chunga akaldohsah pai paitai.

Hichun Ben-hadad’in Ahab jah a aseitai, “Kapan napa alahpeh khopi jouse chu abonchan keiman nang nalekit ing ting, kapan Samaria khopi sung abolna bang bangin nangin jong Damascus khopi sunga khu nang ding mong monga kailhang tampi nakisemdoh thei ahi,” tin aseiye. Hichea hin Ahab chun aseitai, “Hitobang ding chun ken jong nang nalha tange,” atin ahi. Chujongle hitobang chun Ahab hin Ben-hadad chutoh kitepna asemtan ama jong asol mangtai.
Pakai thusah a konin themgaoho chapate khat chun agolte khat jah a chun aseiyin, “Lungset tah-in neisat lih tan,” atia ahileh; agolpa chun asat lih tapoi,

Asat lih lou phat’in khatpa chun aseitai, “Nangman Pakai thusei nanit loujeh hin, vetan, kakoma kona napotdoh jou jou leh sakei bahkai khat’in natha ding ahitai,” ati. Amapa chu agolpa koma kona apotdoh jou jouvin sakei bahkai khat hin analamtinin athat tai.
Chujouvin michom khatma amudoh kit’in ajah a chun aseiyin, “Lungset tah-in neisat lih jeng tan,” atileh; agolpa chun asat tah bah tan, nasa tah-in amavotai.
Hichun themgaopa chu apotdoh pai paiyin lampia lengpa chu anangah jingin, michom beh semin anakisemin, amit te chunga tinatomna khat hi anakiveiyin ahi.

Ahab lengpa hin ahinjotpa phat chun themgaopa jong ahung pengjah jengin aseitai, “Nasohpa keijong hi galmuna chun kagapangin ahileh, vetan, sepai khat hin mi khat ahin manin kahenga ahinpui lut tai, chun ama chun kajah a aseiyin, ‘Hichepa hi anachingin; ijemtia namansah a ahileh, ama khela nang nakithat jeng ding ahi, achutilouleh dangka talent khat’a naleo jeng ding ahi,’ atin;

hichea chun nasohpa keima hoilam lam hama kakiseimo le kah-in amipachu alhai mangdel jengtai,” ati. Hichun Israel lengpan jong amapajah a aseiyin, “Nangman nangma thu nakitan ahitai, nathutan bang bang chun um jeng hen,” atitai.
Chutah chun themgaopan jong aluchanga tinatomna akibeh chu aloi lha loi jengin amitkhuh teni chunga konin akhoh lhan ahileh, Israel lengpa’n jong ama chu themgao khat ahi, ahedoh pai tai.

Chule themgaopa chun lengpa jah a aseitai, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Keiman suhmang dinga kapeh mipa chunga nangma nakhut nalhah tah loujeh chun nangma hinkho hi ama hinkho khela kila ding, namite hi nangma mite manna dinga mang diu ahitai,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chuphat’in Israel lengpa jong lung himo tah le lung nguitah-in ainlama achetan, Samaria lama ahung tai.
Jezreel khoa mi Naboth kitipa hin Jezreel khoa chun lengpilei khat ananeiye, alengpilei chu Samaria lengpa Ahab leng inpi kisahna komcha umah ahi.

Chuin Ahab lengpan Naboth jah a chun aseiyin hitin ati, “Kei din nalengpilei khu neipetan, keiman anche louhing tu nan mang ing ting honin kibol inge, ajeh chu amun khu keima inkomcha ahin anaiye; akhel dingin keiman lengpilei aphajo cheh napenange; ahilouva nangin nadeijoh a ahijongle nangin nasah jat jat chu aman nape jeng ing kate,” ati.
Ahivangin Naboth chun Ahab jah a aseiyin, “Kapu kapate gou nangma kapeh jeng dingpi chu, Pakaiyin eingaidam mai hen,” tin aseiyin anompoi.

Chuphat’in Ahab jong ain lama akichen, ajah a Jezreel khoa Naboth kitipa thusei jeh chun lung himo tah le lung ngui tah-in ain akijot tai; ijeh-inem itileh Naboth hin, “Keiman kapu kapate gou hi nangma-napethei ponge,” tia anasei ahi. Ahab chu ajalkhuna akijamden tan, akihei mangin, an nelouvin aumtai.
Hichun ajinu Jezebel chu Ahab henga ahungin ajah a ahung seitai, “Ipi dinga hibanga lung himo nahiya, an nelouva umah nahim?” ati.

Chuin Ahab jong hin Jezebel jah a aseiyin, “Kalung himona hi keiman Jezreel khoa mi Naboth kitipa jah a khun, ‘Nalengpilei khu sumin neichohsah tan, ahilouva nangin nadeijoh a ahijongleh akhel dingin lengpilei achom khat nape nange,’ tin kaseiyin ahileh; aman eidonbut’in, ‘Kalengpilei khu keiman nang napethei ponge,’ eitin ahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in ajinu Jezebel chun Ahab jah a aseiyin, “Hitobang mi nang hin Israel chunga lengvai napoh jou ding hiyah ong? Thoudoh-in an kineh in lang, lungthim kipah tah chun um jeng tang; Jezreel mipa Naboth hon ken nape naveh tangem,” ati.
Jezebel chun Ahab min chun lekha ajih-in, abonchan Ahab mohor anam khum cheh-in, alekha sut jouse chu Naboth toh khopi khat’a cheng khom kho upa heng leh milen milalte henga athot tai.
Alekha thot ho sunga hi Jezebel hin hitia asut ahi, “An ngol din phong uvin lang, Naboth kitipa hi mipi chungvuma tousah-uvin,

chujou tengleh Naboth chutoh ki-ang ngat ton duhdah bei mi ni tousah-uvin lang, amani chu Naboth hehna thu seisah kit’uvin, hitin sei lhon hen, ‘Nangman Pathen le lengpa nagaosap’e,’ tisah-un. ChuJou tengleh Naboth chu kaidoh-uvin lang son gin sep lih tauvin,” a tin asune.

Khopi sunga kho upa cheng leh akho mite ahiuvin, khopi sunga cheng milen milal chengse ahiuvin, Jezebel’in thu ahinthot bang banguvin aboltauve. Jezebel’in ahinthot lekha a kisun bang bangin ahenguva aseipeh bang chun,
an ngol ding asom’uvin, mipi chungvuma Naboth chu atousah tauve.

Chuin mi duhdah bei ni hi ahung vah lut pai lhonin Naboth angsunga atou lhontai; hiche duhdah bei mi teni hin Naboth chunga hehna thu alhut lhonin, mipi angsunga chun hitin asei lhone, “Naboth hin Pathen le lengpa agaosap’e,” ati lhonin ahi. Hijeh chun mipin jong Naboth chu khopam langa apuidoh uvin songtum akimat’uvin asep lih den tauve.
Chujouvin amahon Jezebel henga thu athot paiyuvin hitin aseiyuve, “Naboth chu songin akisep’in akithat tai,” atiuve.

Naboth chu songin akisep in chule athilotai, ti thusim hi Jezebel’in ajah doh phat chun Jezebel hin Ahab jah a asei pai jengin, “Kipatdoh loiyin lang Jezreel khoa mipa Naboth in alengpilei suma chohsah dinga napeh lou khu galo loitan; ajeh chu Naboth chu ahing tapoi, athitai,” ati.
Naboth athitai, ti Ahab hin ajah doh jou jouvin, Ahab jong chu Jezreel khoa mi Naboth kitipa lengpilei lo din akipatdoh-in achesuh pai pai jenge.
Hichun Tishbe khoa mi Elijah henga Pakaiyin thu ahinseiyin hitin aseiye,
“Kipatdoh loiyin lang Samaria khopia cheng Israel lengpa Ahab khu gakimupi loiyin; vetan, ama chu tuhin Naboth lengpilei lo din achen aleilaiya aumpet ahi.

Chutengle nangman Ahab jah a nasei ding ahi, ‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, “Nangin mi natha a chule alengpilei mun jong nalo ding ham?” ati,’ gatin. Chujongleh nangman ajah hitia nasei ding ahi, ‘Pakaiyin hitin aeiye: “Uichaten Naboth thisan ale lenau mun laitah a chu nangma thisan jong uichaten ahinle diu ahi,” tin aseiye,’ gatin,” ati.

Ahab chun Elijah jah a aseiyin, “Vo kamelmahpa, nangin neimudoh kit leu ahitai ong?” atia ahileh; Elijah chun adonbut paiyin, “Nang le nang Pakai mitmua thilse bol dinga soh banga nakijoh doh jeh a keiman nang kamatdoh kit nahitai.

Vetan, keiman nachunga setna kahin poh lut khum ding nahi; nangma kaphet ngim hel ding nahin, Israelte lah a Ahab mi ahi, tia kisei tapou chu chamlhat hihen soh hijongleh pasala kai kasuh beihel ding ahi;

hitia hi nangma insung jong Nebat chapa Jerobo’am insunga tobang kahisah ding, Ahi’jah chapa Ba’asha insung tobang kahisah ding ahi, nangman keima neiphin lung hang jeh le Israelte nachonset sah jeh ahi.
Chutengle Jezebel chung chang thudola hin Pakaiyin aseitai, ‘Jezreel khosunga uichaten Jezebel thilong aneh diu ahi,’ ati.
Chujongle koi hijeng jongleh Ahab insung mi tapou chu uichan aneh ding, Ahab insung gamlah a thiden auma ahileh chunga leng vachaten aneh diu ahi, tin aseiye,” ati.
Mihem koimacha jong ajinu Jezebel kitinun ajol lhah a Pakai mitmua thilse bol dinga ama le ama kijoh doh a Ahab kitipa tobang aum khapoi.
Ahab kitipa vang hin masang laiya Pakaiyin Israel chate masanga adel mangsa Amor mite chonna bang bangin thet umtah tah milimdoi jeng ahouvin ahi.
Elijah thusei chengse hi Ahab hin ajah doh phat chun aponsil abottel soh jengin, khaodip pon jeng akisil’in, an angol’in, khaodip pon chunga alum jin, lung lhai louhel’in avah thai tan ahi.
Hichun Tishbe khoa mi Elijah henga chun Pakaiyin thu ahinseiyin, hitin ati,

“Keima angsunga Ahab ama le ama aki-ngaitom jeng khu namu hi tam? Hitobanga ama le ama nasa tah a aki-ngaitom jeng jeh khun keiman ama hinlai sunga achunga thilse kalhunsah lou ding ahitai; amavang achapa khanga vang Ahab insung mite chunga thilse kalhunsah ding ahi,” tin aseitan ahi.
Kum thum sungin Syria le Israelte gal akisat tapouve.
Kum thum lhin kum chun Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat kitipa chu Israel lengpa henga kholjin in ahung suh-in ahi.

Hichelai hin Israel lengpa’n asepaite jah a aseiyin, “Ramoth-gilead kho khu eiho gam ahi, ti nahet louvu ham, eiho hi lah thip beh-in ium jeng theiyun Syria lengpa khut a kona lahpeh din igel hih hel’uvin ahine?” ati.

Chujongle Ahab hin Jehoshaphat hi akitemin, “Ramoth-gilead gal sat dinga neikonhu thei lou ding ham?” atia ahileh; Jehoshaphat jong hin Israel lengpa chu adonbut paiyin, “Kei le nang ichom ihiya, kamite leh namite hi ichom ham chule kasakolte leh nang sakolte ibonchauva khat ihiu himen,” atitai.
Hichea hin Jehoshaphat hin Israel lengpa jah a aseiyin, “Amasa’n Pakaiyin ipi asei ding ham, dong masa’n?” ati.

Hijeh chun Israel lengpa’n themgao ho akoukhomsoh keiyin ahileh abonchauvin themgao ja li to bang alhinguve. Ajah-uva hin Ahab chun aseiyin, “Keima Ramoth-gilead sat dinga kakon ding ham kakonda ding hi tam?” atia ahileh; themgaoho chun aseiyun, “Kontou jeng le chun Pakaiyin lengpa nangma khut’a napen tin najosah ding ahinai,” atiuve.
Ahivang in Jehoshaphat chun asei kit nalaiyin, “Idohbe theiyu Pakai themgao adang khat beh umlouva hi tam?” atia ahileh;

Jehoshaphat jah a chun Israel lengpa’n aseiyin, “Pakaiyin ipi asei ding ham, tia idohbe thei nah laiyu mi khat vang aum nalaiye, ama chu Micaiah ahin kei chung changa gaothu asei tengleh thilse jeng jeng aseiji jeh a, thilpha eiseipeh lou kahet’a ama khu kahotjoh ahitai,” ati. Ahin Jehoshaphat chun aphoh-in, “Lengpan chutin seida le chun aphai,” ati.
Chuphat’in Israel lengpa’n vaibola pang mi khat hi akouvin ajah a, “Imlah chapa Micaiah kitipa khu gakou lutjengin,” tin asoltai.

Hichea hin Israel lengpa leh Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat chu laltouna atou lhonin, leng pon loupi akisil lhonin, Samaria khopi kulpi kelkot phunga hongcha a chun anatou lhone; chutengle amani angsunga chun themgao chengsen jong gaothu anasei sei jenguvin ahi.

Chule Chena’anah chapa Zedeki’ah kitipa chun ama ding mong mongin thih hi saki bangin akikhenin, hitin aseitai, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Hiche saki lima kikheng hoa hi nangin Syria mite chu amah thah kahseuva nano no jeng ding ahi,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chuin themgao dang ho jong chun hitima hin aseiyuvin, agao gao jenguve, “Ramoth-gilead lama gal kontou loiyin, gal najo ding ahi; gal mite chu Pakaiyin lengpa khut’a ahinpeh doh jeng ding ahi,” ati.

Micaiah kouva hung sottolle pa chun Micaiah jah a aseiyin hitin ati, “Vetemin, themgao dang jouse khun kitoh chet’in thu aseiyuvin, lengpa lungdei dei asei jenguvin ahi; nangin jong amaho lah a mi khat thusei bang bang khun sei tei teiyin, lungdei dol’in seijon,” atin ahi.
Ahivangin Micaiah chun aseiyin, “Pakai hing jing min a kasei ahi, Pakaiyin keijah a asei sei chu kaseijoh ding ahibouve,” ati.

Micaiah chu lengpa henga ahung phat’in lengpa’n Micaiah jah a aseiyin, “Micaiah, Ramoth-gilead lama galsat dinga kakon diu ham kakonda diu hitam?” tia adoh leh; Micaiah chun lengpa adonbut’in, “Kontou jeng tah, gal hinjou naveh ta chun; galte chu Pakaiyin lengpa khut’a pedoh naveh ta,” atipeh-e.

Chutah chun lengpa’n jong ajah a aseitai, “Ijat vei lom ken nang hi kajol jol jeng nahitah a, nangin kei jah a thil dang imacha seikhel louhela Pakai min a adih jeng chabou nasei sei jeng hitam ong?” atin ahi.

Hichun Micaiah jong chun aseitai, “Keiman molsang chunga khun achingpa bei kelngoite jamcheh bangin Israel pumpi ajamcheh uva akithecheh soh hel’u kamutai; chujongle Pakaiyin aseiyin, ‘Hiche mite hin lamkai apu anei tapouve, amitakip ama ama inlam cheh a akinungle cheh tauve’, tin aseiye,” ati.
Chuin Israel lengpa’n Jehoshaphat jah a aseiyin, “Hichepa hin thilpha seidoh pon tin, kei chung chang thudola thilse jeng aseidoh-a gao ding ahi, tia keiman najah a kaseisa hilou ham?” ati.
Chuphat’in Micaiah chun asei jenge, “Pakai thusei hi ngaijon: Pakai chu alaltouna chunga atoupet kamun, vanmi janel akoma chun ajet le aveiya ading chah kheh jenguvin ahi;

hichun Pakaiyin mi ahol’in aseitai, ‘Koipen tah chea Ahab khu agatildoh a, chutengle ama Ramoth-gilead chunga gabola kontouva hung thiden ding ham’!’ tia aseiya ahileh; khat’in thil khat aseiyin, achomdang khat’in thilchom dang khatma aseiyin ahi.
Hichun lhagao khat ahung pheiyin Pakai angsunga adingin hitin aseiye, ‘Keiman gatildoh nange,’ ati.

Chuin Pakaiyin jong adongin ajah a ‘Ina-galo ding ham’? atia ahileh; aman jong aseitai, ‘Keima kondoh pai pai ying ting athemgaote kamsunga khu jou seisah thei lhagaova kagapan ding ahi,’ atin ahileh; hichun Pakaiyin aseipeh tan, ‘Nang hin Ahab nagatildoh ding ahin, najotei ding ahi; kipatdoh loiyin gabol tan,’ ati.
Hijeh chun tun vetan, Pakaiyin hiche nathemgaote kamsunga hi thujou seiji lhagao khat apansah ahitai; Pakaiyin nang dinga thilse aseijoh ahibouve,” atin ahi.

Chutah chun Chena’anah chapa Zedeki’ah kitipa chun ahin nailut paiyin Micaiah chu ageiphe abeh peh jengin, aseipai tai, “I-atileh Pakai Lhagao chu keiya kona potdoh a nang chungjoh a pansa thu asei ding ham?” ati.
Ahivangin Micaiah chun aseiyin, “Insung indan sung nunga nang le nang kisel dinga najamlut nikho ahung lhun teng leh nangma hung kivetan,” atipeh-e.
Chutah chun Israel lengpa’n asei paiyin, “Micaiah chu man loiyin lang khopi sung vaipo pang Amon le lengpa chapa Joash henga kailut tan;

chujongle amani jah a seipeh-in lang, ‘Lengpan hitin aseiye, “Hichepa hi songkul sunga khum’ uvin lang chule twi geochao tah-in anapeuvin keima damsela kahung kilekit kahsen, tin aseiye,’ tiuvin,” ati.

Ahinla Micaiah chun aseitei teiyin, “Nangma damsela nahung lhun kit pou pouva ahileh Pakaiyin keijah a thu aseilou hinte,” ati changmel jenge. Chujongle Micaiah chun athusei chun lhang asamin, “Nang ho mipin jong nabonchan ngaisoh keiyuvin,” ati.
Hiti hin Israel lengpa leh Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat chu Ramoth-gilead a galbol din akontou lhon tan ahi.

Hichun Israel lengpa’n Jehoshaphat jah a aseiyin, “Keiman kalim le kavon khel ing ting, limchom pun kisem ing ting galmuna gapang tange, nang vangin lengpon loupi kisil den tan,” ati. Hitobang chun Israel lengpa chu limchom limin akisemin galmuna agapang tai.
Hichea hin Syria lengpa’n asakol kangtalai tol’a pang sepai lamkai mi somthum le ni jen chu ahil masan, “Milen mineo koima dang kisatpi hih hel uvin, Israel lengpa chubou nasat diu ahi,” ati.

Hiche sakol kangtalai tol’a pang ho hin Jehoshaphat chu amudoh phat’uvin amaho le amaho akihouvun, “Hichepa khu Israel lengpa hitei tei ding ahi,” atitauve. Hijeh chun amaho akiheiyun ama chu sat din agotauvin ahileh, Jehoshaphat chu ahung pengjah jengin ahitai.
Amapa chu Israel lengpa ahipoi, ti sakol kangtalai tol’a pang hon amudoh phat’uvin, ama nung adel’uva konin ahung kinungle kit tauve.

Ahin sepai khat hin athalpi chu agah donkap’a ahileh Israel lengpa akap khatan, agalvon tho kah, aomphu khi kah a aleng lut tai; hiche phat hin Ahab chun akangtalai tolpa jah a aseiyin, “Kiheiyin lang galmuna konin neitoldoh tan, keima min eikap kha tai,” ati.

Hiche nikho chun gal ahahsa cheh cheh jeng tan, lengpa jong chu nilhah lam, athi geiyin akangtalai chunga akingaiyin Syria mite heng lam ave vejengin ahi; akikap khahna maha a thisan longdoh chun akangtalai chu tol geiyin achapsuh jenge.
Nisa lhum lhumin sepaite lah a lhang ahung kisamin, “Mi koi hijongle akhopi cheh kijot hen lang, ama ama gamsung cheh a cheta hen!” ahung kiti.
Israel lengpa chu athipai paiyin Samaria khopia ahinpo lut tauve; mihon lengpa chu Samaria khopia avuitauvin ahi.

Chujouvin lengpa touna kangtalai chu Samaria khopia twikula athisan asop lhauvin ahileh, athisan chu uichaten aleh leh-uvin, chule noti hon jong kisil nan amanguve, hiti hin Pakai thusei guilhun nan aumdoh soh keiye.
Ahab natoh thilbol adang jouse, atohdoh chengse, saiha in asah ho ahin, khopi dang dang asah doh ho jong aboncha Israel lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh keijah hilou ham?
Hiti hin Ahab jong apu apate toh akijam khomin; achapa Ahazi’ah kitipa chu ama khel din lengvaipon apang tai.
Israel lengpa Ahab leng chan kal kum li lhin kumin Asa chapa Jehoshaphat kitipa chun Judah gama lengvai ahinpo pantan ahi.
Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Jehoshaphat hi akum somthum le kum nga alhing tai, chule Jerusalem khopia chun kum som ni le kum nga sungin lengvai anapoi. Anu min chu Azu’bah akitin, Shilhi chanu ahi.

Jehoshaphat jong hi apa Asa kitipa chon bang bangin achonin, Pakai mitmun thildih jeng anabol’in, thilchom ngaitonan akihei mang hih hel’e; ahivangin khomol dunga doiphung ho vang chu asumang dehpon, mipin jong hiche dunga hin kilhaina abol bol nalaiyun, gimnamtui jeng alhut lhut nalaiyuve.
Jehoshaphat hin Isreal lengpa chuto jong kichamna anaseme.
Jehoshaphat natoh athilbol adang jouse, athahat aphondoh jouse ahin, itobanga gal anasat’a, ipi abol ham ti aboncha Judah lengte thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh kei hilou ham?
Jehoshaphat hin apa Asa khanglaiya kisumang moh pasal notia pang ho chu gamsunga konin asumangin asutheng hel tai.
Hiche lai hin Edom gama leng anaumpon, leng noi douva pangpa chu leng jong hitha jeng anahi.
Jehoshaphat hin Ophir gama sana tolna dingin Tarshish kong innei akisemin ahi; ahinla E’zion-geber kiti laiya hi akong innei chu akitajal a ake phat’in ache thei tapouvin ahi.
Hichun Ahab chapa Ahazi’ ah kitipa hin Jehoshaphat jah a aseiyin, “Keima sepaite jong hi nangma sepaite chutoh kong inneiya khun kilhonsah tan,” atia ahileh; Jehoshaphat chu anom poi.
Chujouvin Jehoshaphat jong chu apu apate toh akijam khomin, mihon ama jong apu apate lah ma ma a David khopi sunga avuitauve; chule achapa Jeho’ram chun ama khel ‘in lengvai apotai.
Judah lengpa Jehoshaphat leng chan kal kum som le kum sagi lhin kumin Ahab chapa Ahaziah kitipa hin Samaria khopia chun Israel chunga lengvai ahinpo panin, Israel chunga kum ni sungin lengvai apoi.
Ama jong hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng abol’in, apa le anu chonna bang bangin achon jengin, Israelte chonset sah Nebat chapa Jerobo’am chonna bang bangin anachon’e.
Chujongle Ahaziah kitipa hin Ba’al doi ahouvin chibai anaboh-e; apa chonna bang bangin achonin, Pakai Israel Pathen chu achonna aum chan jousen aphin lung hang lheh jengin ahiye.
